title: Bifunction and Interlevel Delaunay Trifiltrations
comment: 37 pages, 7 figures. Full version of a paper to appear in the Proceedings of the 42nd International Symposium on Computational geometry (SoCG 2026)
summary: A key property of the Delaunay filtration is that it is topologically (i.e., weakly) equivalent to the offset (union-of-balls) filtration. Recently, this filtration has been extended to point clouds equipped with an $\mathbb{R}$-valued function, yielding a computable 2-parameter filtration that satisfies an analogous weak equivalence. Motivated in part by the study of time-varying data, we introduce a 3-parameter extension of the Delaunay filtration for point clouds equipped with an $\mathbb{R}^2$-valued function, also satisfying an analogous weak equivalence. For a point cloud $X \subset \mathbb{R}^d$, our trifiltration has size $O\bigl(|X|^{\lceil(d+1)/2\rceil+1}\bigr)$. We present an algorithm that computes this trifiltration in time $O\bigl(|X|^{\lceil d/2\rceil+2}\bigr)$, together with an implementation. Our experiments demonstrate that implementation can handle thousands of points in $\mathbb{R}^3$, with memory growth that is nearly linear.

AI.tldr: 本文将Delaunayfiltration从2参数扩展到3参数，用于处理配备ℝ²值函数的点云，并保持类似的弱等价性质。对于点云X⊂ℝ^d，三元filtration的规模为O(|X|^⌈(d+1)/2⌉+1)，算法时间复杂度为O(|X|^⌈d/2⌉+2)。实验表明该实现可以在ℝ³中处理数千个点，内存增长近似线性。
AI.motivation: 研究的动机来源于对时变数据的兴趣。原有Delaunayfiltration和offsetfiltration满足拓扑弱等价，但仅限于单参数（ℝ值函数）情况。为处理时变数据，需要将filtration扩展到能够 handling随时间变化的数据结构，即从ℝ值函数扩展到ℝ²值函数。
AI.method: 通过引入第三个参数扩展Delaunayfiltration，构建一个3参数filtration。具体方法包括：1）定义R²值函数上的三元filtration；2）证明新filtration满足与扩展offsetfiltration类似的弱等价性质；3）设计计算该三元filtration的算法并分析其复杂度上界。
AI.result: 对于点云X⊂ℝ^d，三元filtration的大小为O(|X|^⌈(d+1)/2⌉+1)，算法可在O(|X|^⌈d/2⌉+2)时间内完成计算。在ℝ³中的实验表明，该实现可以处理数千个点，且内存增长接近线性。
AI.conclusion: 成功将Delaunayfiltration从2参数扩展到3参数，处理R²值函数，并建立了弱等价理论。算法在三维情况下具有实用价值，为时变数据的拓扑分析提供了新的工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry and topological data analysis (Delaunay trifiltrations), not Computer Graphics in the sense of video-based 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D videos using diffusion models, VLMs, pose estimation, etc. This paper deals with extending Delaunay filtrations for time-varying data in computational topology - a completely different application domain with no overlap in methods or goals.

title: A geometric modelling framework to support the design of heterogeneous lattice structures with non-linearly varying geometry
comment: 36 pages, 17 figures. Published in Journal of Computational Design and Engineering
summary: Geometric modelling has been a crucial component of the design process ever since the introduction of the first Computer-Aided Design (CAD) systems. Additive Manufacturing (AM) pushes design freedom to previously unachievable limits. AM allows the manufacturing of lattice structures which are otherwise close to impossible to be manufactured conventionally. Yet, the geometric modelling of heterogeneous lattice structures is still greatly limited. Thus, the AM industry is now in a situation where the manufacturing capabilities exceed the geometric modelling capabilities. While there have been advancements in the modelling of heterogeneous lattice structures, the review of relevant literature revealed critical limitations of the existing approaches. These limitations include their inability to model non-linear variation of geometric parameters, as well as the limited amount of controllable geometric parameters. This work presents a novel geometric modelling methodology based on function representation as an attempt to bridge this gap. The proposed approach avoids the manual definition of geometric parameters and provides a method to control them with mathematical functions instead. A software prototype implementing the proposed approach is presented, and several use-cases are analysed.

AI.tldr: 本文针对增材制造领域几何建模能力滞后于制造能力的问题，提出了一种基于函数表示的新型建模方法，旨在用数学函数控制几何参数以实现更灵活的异质点阵结构建模。
AI.motivation: 增材制造(AM)极大拓展了设计自由度，使得点阵结构的制造成为可能。然而，目前的几何建模能力已落后于制造能力，现有的异质点阵结构建模方法存在关键局限：无法建模非线性变化的几何参数，且可控几何参数数量有限。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于函数表示(F-representation)的新型几何建模方法。该方法避免手动定义几何参数，改用数学函数来控制参数，实现非线性和多参数的可编程调控。文中还展示了实现该方法的软件原型并分析了几个应用案例。
AI.result: 成功构建了一套基于函数表示的几何建模软件原型，证明了该方法能够通过数学函数灵活控制多个几何参数，包括非线性变化，并展示了多个应用案例验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: The proposed基于函数表示的几何建模方法为解决当前增材制造中异质点阵结构建模的局限性提供了一种新途径。该方法通过数学函数而非手动定义来控制几何参数，有望弥合制造能力与建模能力之间的差距。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的应用领域。该论文是关于增材制造中的异质点阵结构几何建模，使用函数表示法(F-representation)控制几何参数。而研究画像关注的是从2D视频中提取3D运动、使用扩散模型、VLM、视频生成先验进行动作生成的计算机图形学任务。这个论文属于制造工程/增材制造领域，与视频运动提取和生成在应用场景、方法和目标上完全不同。

title: Maximum-Weight Two Boxes Symmetric Difference Problem
summary: Let $P$ be a set of $n$ points in the plane, where each element of $P$ is assigned a weight $ω(p)$, positive or negative. In this paper, we present an algorithm that runs in $O(n^4\log n)$ time and $O(n)$ space to find two possibly overlapping axis-aligned rectangles $A$ and $B$ so as to maximize the total weight of the points contained in the symmetric difference of $A$ and $B$. The same optimization framework can easily be adapted to solve related problems such as to maximize the total weight in the symmetric difference of $k \geq 3$ boxes and/or in the union of $k \geq 2$ boxes.

AI.tldr: This paper presents an O(n^4 log n) time algorithm to find two axis-aligned rectangles maximizing the weighted symmetric difference of enclosed points, with extensions to multiple boxes.
AI.motivation: The motivation of this paper is to solve the problem of finding two axis-aligned rectangles A and B (which may overlap) to maximize the total weight of points in the symmetric difference of A and B, given a set of weighted points in the plane. This extends previous work on similar optimization problems.
AI.method: The method involves presenting an algorithm that runs in O(n^4 log n) time and O(n) space. The algorithm is designed to efficiently search through possible rectangle configurations to find the optimal solution.
AI.result: The result is an algorithm that can find two possibly overlapping axis-aligned rectangles A and B that maximize the total weight of points contained in the symmetric difference of A and B. Additionally, the same optimization framework can be adapted to solve related problems for k ≥ 3 boxes in symmetric difference and/or union of k ≥ 2 boxes.
AI.conclusion: The conclusion is that this approach provides an efficient solution to the described optimization problem with a running time of O(n^4 log n) and O(n) space, and it can be extended to handle more complex variations involving multiple boxes.

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry/algorithms - specifically solving a geometric optimization problem about axis-aligned rectangles and weighted points. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics as defined in the research profile. There's no mention of video processing, 2D-to-3D motion extraction, diffusion models, VLMs, pose estimation, temporal modeling, or any video generation priors. This is a pure algorithms/papers theory paper completely unrelated to the computer graphics research area involving video understanding, motion generation, and visual language models.

title: Argo: Efficient Importance Labeling for Enterprise Email Systems
summary: Email importance labeling has long been a critical yet challenging problem for businesses and individuals. Traditional approaches; such as keyword matching, user-defined rules, and sender-based heuristics; demand extensive manual feature engineering and fail to scale effectively or generalize. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong potential and a natural fit for this task, offering deep contextual understanding and superior labeling quality. However, using LLM models like GPT-4.1 at enterprise email volumes incurs prohibitive computational costs and hinders real-world deployment. We explore the trade-off space of using alternative labeling schemes as opposed to GPT4.1 scale LLMs, with the goal of achieving near GPT level labeling quality with significantly lower cost. We develop Argo, an enterprise email labeling framework, where we construct a profiler to efficiently search the cost quality trade-off space of labeling and identify cost-efficient alternatives to labeling emails. Additionally, we design an on-demand provisioning scheme to intelligently scale Argo with real time load, to minimize cost increases during peak load inference. Over 3 open-source email datasets, Argo achieves 148-167X inference cost reduction with negligible quality degradation and 20-640000X lower profiling costs, making large-scale, context-aware email labeling practical for enterprises.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Argo，一个企业邮件重要性标注框架，旨在解决使用GPT-4.1等大型语言模型进行邮件标注时面临的高成本问题。通过构建探查器和按需供给方案，Argo在保持接近GPT质量的同时，实现了148-167倍的推理成本降低。
AI.motivation: 企业邮件重要性标注是一个关键但具有挑战性的任务。传统方法如关键词匹配、用户定义规则和基于发件人的启发式方法需要大量的人工特征工程，且难以扩展和泛化。虽然GPT-4.1等大型语言模型能提供更好的上下文理解和标注质量，但在企业邮件规模下使用这些模型会产生极高的计算成本，阻碍实际部署。因此需要在成本和质量之间找到平衡。
AI.method: 论文开发了Argo企业邮件标注框架，包含两个核心组件：1）构建一个探查器（profiler）来高效搜索标注的成本-质量权衡空间，识别具有成本效益的替代标注方案；2）设计按需供给方案，根据实时负载智能调整Argo的规模，以最小化峰值负载推理期间的成本增加。
AI.result: 在3个开源邮件数据集上的实验表明，Argo实现了148-167倍的推理成本降低，质量降解可忽略不计，以及20-640000倍更低的探查成本。这使得大规模、上下文感知的邮件标注对企业来说变得切实可行。
AI.conclusion: Argo框架成功地在大规模企业邮件标注场景中实现了成本与质量的平衡。通过创新的探查器和按需供给机制，该工作为企业在实际应用中采用大型语言模型进行邮件标注提供了经济可行的解决方案，具有重要的实践价值。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于企业邮件重要性标注的NLP应用，使用LLM进行文本分类，与计算机图形学完全无关。它不涉及任何3D运动生成、视频生成、姿态估计、扩散模型或视觉语言模型在图形学中的应用。Application domain完全不匹配。

title: Benchmarking and Improving Monitors for Out-Of-Distribution Alignment Failure in LLMs
summary: Many safety and alignment failures of large language models (LLMs) occur due to out-of-distribution (OOD) situations: unusual prompt or response patterns that are unforeseen by model developers. We systematically study whether LLM monitoring pipelines can detect these OOD alignment failures by introducing a benchmark called Misalignment Out Of Distribution (MOOD). It is difficult to find failures that are truly OOD for off-the-shelf models trained on vast safety datasets. We sidestep this by including a restricted training set in MOOD that we use to train our own monitors, as well as seven test sets with diverse alignment failures that are outside the training distribution. Using MOOD, we find that guard models (safety classifiers) often fail to generalize OOD. To fix this, we propose combining guard models with OOD detectors. We test four types of OOD detectors and find that a combination of a guard model with Mahalanobis distance and perplexity-based OOD detectors can improve recall from 39% to 45%. We also establish positive scaling trends across model scales for monitors that combine a guard model and OOD detector; we find that incorporating OOD detection into monitoring achieves a higher recall gain than using a guard model with 20 times more parameters. Our work suggests that OOD detection should be a crucial component of LLM monitoring and provides a foundation for further work on this important problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOOD基准，用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）监控pipeline在分布外（OOD）场景下检测对齐失败的能力。研究发现，结合 guard 模型与 OOD 检测器可提升失败召回率，且 Larger 模型表现更好。
AI.motivation: 许多 LLM 安全和对齐失败是由于分布外（OOD）情况导致的：即模型开发者未预见到的异常提示或响应模式。现有监控 pipeline 难以有效检测这些 OOD 对齐失败。
AI.method: 构建 MOOD 基准，包含受限训练集和七个不同的对齐失败测试集；测试四种 OOD 检测器与 guard 模型的组合效果，包括 Mahalanobis 距离和 perplexity 等方法。
AI.result: Guard 模型与 Mahalanobis 距离及 perplexity OOD 检测器组合可将召回率从 39% 提升至 45%；观察到监控器随模型规模增大呈现正向缩放趋势；融入 OOD 检测的监控器比使用 20 倍参数的 guard 模型获得更高召回率增益。
AI.conclusion: OOD 检测应成为 LLM 监控的关键组件，MOOD 基准为该重要问题提供了进一步研究的基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM safety and alignment monitoring (using perplexity, Mahalanobis distance for text-based OOD detection), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 2D video to 3D motion generation, pose estimation, or any visual/video understanding tasks. Despite both mentioning "VLM," this paper deals with Large Language Models (text-based), whereas the research profile requires Visual Language Models for video understanding. The application domain (LLM safety monitoring) has zero overlap with the target domain (human motion generation from video).

title: PhysX-Omni: Unified Simulation-Ready Physical 3D Generation for Rigid, Deformable, and Articulated Objects
summary: Simulation-ready physical 3D assets have emerged as a promising direction owing to their broad applicability in downstream tasks. However, most existing 3D generation methods either neglect physical properties or are limited to a single asset category, e.g., rigid, deformable, or articulated objects. To address these limitations, we introduce PhysX-Omni, a unified framework for simulation-ready physical 3D generation across diverse asset types. Specifically, we develop a novel and efficient geometry representation tailored for Vision-Language Models, which directly encodes high-resolution 3D structures without compression, significantly improving generation performance. In addition, we construct the first general simulation-ready 3D dataset, PhysXVerse, covering diverse indoor and outdoor categories. Furthermore, to comprehensively and flexibly evaluate both generative and understanding capabilities in the wild, we propose PhysX-Bench, which encompasses six key attributes: geometry, absolute scale, material, affordance, kinematics, and function description. Extensive experiments with conventional metrics and PhysX-Bench show that PhysX-Omni performs strongly in both generation and understanding. Moreover, additional studies further validate the potential of PhysX-Omni for applications in simulation-ready scene generation and robotic policy learning. We believe PhysX-Omni can significantly advance a wide range of downstream applications, particularly in embodied AI and physics-based simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出PhysX-Omni，一个用于生成 simulation-ready 物理3D资产的统一框架，能够处理多种资产类别（刚性、可变形、关节对象等）。方法包括：开发针对视觉语言模型的高效几何表示直接编码高分辨率3D结构；构建首个通用simulation-ready 3D数据集PhysXVerse；提出综合评估基准PhysX-Bench涵盖六个关键属性。结果：在生成和理解任务上都表现优异，并验证了在场景生成和机器人策略学习中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成方法存在的问题：(1) 忽视物理属性；(2) 仅限于单一资产类别（如刚性、可变形或关节对象）。这些局限性制约了3D资产在下游任务中的应用。
AI.method: (1) 开发针对Vision-Language Model的新型高效几何表示，直接编码高分辨率3D结构无需压缩；(2) 构建首个通用simulation-ready 3D数据集PhysXVerse，覆盖室内外多样类别；(3) 提出综合评估基准PhysX-Bench，涵盖几何、绝对尺度、材质、功能性、运动学和功能描述六个属性。
AI.result: PhysX-Omni在生成和理解任务上都表现强劲，实验验证了其在simulation-ready场景生成和机器人策略学习应用中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: PhysX-Omni是一个统一的framework，能够跨不同资产类型生成simulation-ready物理3D资产，显著推进行物体AI和基于物理的仿真等下游应用。

relevance_reason: 该论文主要关注静态3D资产（刚性、可变形、关节对象）的生成，用于物理模拟和机器人策略学习。而研究档案聚焦于从2D视频中提取人体三维运动信息、动作生成及时序建模。虽然都属计算机图形学领域，但应用领域完全不同：该论文是物体级3D资产生成，而非人体运动/姿态估计。两者的核心技术（VLM编码几何表示、物理属性）也不针对视频运动分析。因此相关性较低。

title: TO-Agents: A Multi-Agent AI Pipeline for Preference-Guided Topology Optimization
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the ASME 2026 International Design Engineering Technical Conferences (IDETC2026)
summary: Topology optimization can generate efficient structures, but designers often must manually translate qualitative intent, such as desired visual style, product experience, or manufacturability into solver settings that are not directly tied to those preferences. We present TO-Agents, a multi-agent AI framework that connects natural-language design intent with iterative topology optimization. The framework converts a human-provided problem description into validated solver inputs, runs a topology optimization solver, renders the resulting 3D topology, and uses multi-view vision-language reasoning with an independent judge agent to critique each result and revise solver parameters. We evaluate the framework on two long-horizon design tasks: a cantilever beam benchmark and a phone-stand product design. In both tasks, the designer specifies an aesthetic preference for hierarchically branched structures inspired by natural tree morphologies, and the system performs four revision cycles across ten independent replicates. TO-Agents produces at least one preference-aligned design in 60% of trials for each case study, corresponding to up to 6x more successful trials than an ablated pipeline without visual or historical feedback. Judge scores and human evaluations show that the pipeline can identify effective parameter levers, recover from poor revisions, and expand design exploration. A manufacturing agent further post-processes top-ranked designs for additive manufacturing, enabling end-to-end intent-to-prototype design. We also identify failure modes, including overshooting, selective memory, misplaced tools, and incorrect parameter reasoning. These results suggest that agentic topology optimization can shift designers from low-level parameter tuning toward higher-level specification of form and function, while highlighting safeguards needed for reliable autonomous engineering design.

AI.tldr: TO-Agents是一个多智能体AI框架，将自然语言设计意图与迭代拓扑优化连接起来，通过多视角视觉-语言推理和独立评判智能体来批评和修订结果，在悬臂梁基准和手机支架产品设计上完成四轮修订，产生至少60%的偏好对齐设计。
AI.motivation: 拓扑优化虽然可以生成高效结构，但设计师通常需要手动将定性意图（如视觉风格、产品体验、可制造性）转换为求解器设置，这些设置与用户偏好没有直接关联。现有方法缺乏将设计意图自动转化为优化参数的能力。
AI.method: 提出TO-Agents多智能体AI框架，包括：(1)将人类问题描述转换为验证的求解器输入，(2)运行拓扑优化求解器，(3)渲染生成的3D拓扑，(4)使用多视角视觉-语言推理与独立评判智能体批评结果并修订求解器参数。还包含制造智能体对顶级设计进行后处理以实现增材制造。
AI.result: 在悬臂梁基准和手机支架产品设计两个长周期任务上，TO-Agents在每个案例中60%的试验产生至少一个偏好对齐设计，比没有视觉或历史反馈的消融管道多6倍成功试验。评判分数和人工评估表明管道可以识别有效的参数杠杆、从糟糕的修订中恢复并扩展设计探索。
AI.conclusion: 智能体拓扑优化可以将设计师从低级参数调整转向高级形式和功能规范，同时突出了可靠自主工程设计所需的保障措施。失败模式包括过冲、选择性记忆、工具放置错误和参数推理错误。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域：研究档案聚焦于计算机图形学中的三维运动生成（从2D视频提取人体运动），而该论文是关于结构工程领域的拓扑优化（拓扑优化用于力学设计和制造）。虽然两者都使用了VLM（视觉语言模型），但目的和应用完全不同。该论文讨论的是如何将设计意图转化为拓扑优化参数，用于悬臂梁和手机支架等产品设计，完全不涉及运动生成、姿态估计、视频先验、或扩散模型在图像/视频生成中的应用。这是一个工程设计自动化问题，而非计算机图形学中的运动生成或视频理解问题。

title: Lens: Rethinking Training Efficiency for Foundational Text-to-Image Models
summary: We introduce Lens, a 3.8B-parameter T2I model that achieves performance competitive with, and in several cases surpassing, state-of-the-art models with more than 6B parameters across various benchmarks, while requiring significantly less training compute. For example, Lens requires only about 19.3% of the training compute used by Z-Image. The training efficiency of Lens stems from two key strategies beyond its compact model size. First, we maximize data information density per training batch by (i) training on Lens-800M, a dataset of 800M densely captioned image-text pairs whose captions are generated by GPT-4.1 and contain approximately 109 words on average, providing richer semantic supervision than conventional short captions, and (ii) constructing each batch from images with multiple resolutions and diverse aspect ratios, thereby enlarging the effective visual coverage of each optimization step. Second, we improve convergence speed through careful architectural choices, including adopting a semantic VAE that provides better latent representations and employing a strong language encoder that accelerates optimization while enabling multilingual generalization from English-only training data. After pre-training, we apply RL with taxonomy-driven prompts (Lens-RL-8K) and structured reward rubrics to suppress artifacts and improve visual quality, a reasoner module with training-free system prompt search to better align user requests with the model, and distillation-based acceleration for 4-step inference. Through efficient training and systematic optimization, Lens generalizes to arbitrary aspect ratios from 1:2 to 2:1 and resolutions up to 1440^2, and supports prompts in several commonly used languages. Thanks to its compact size, Lens generates a 1024^2 image in 3.15 seconds on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU, while its distilled turbo version performs 4-step generation in 0.84 seconds.

AI.tldr: Lens是一个38亿参数的文本到图像生成模型，通过高质量密集标注数据集、多分辨率批次、语义VAE和强语言编码器等策略实现了极高的训练效率，仅需约19.3%的训练计算即达到与超过60亿参数模型相当的性能，并支持多语言和高分辨率生成。
AI.motivation: 在保持竞争力的图像生成性能的同时，大幅降低训练和推理的计算成本。当前的state-of-the-art模型参数量大(超过60亿)、训练计算需求高，但作者希望通过更高效的训练策略(更高数据信息密度、更好的架构选择)来实现相当甚至更好的性能。
AI.method: 1)构建包含8亿密集标注图像-文本对的高质量数据集Lens-800M，平均每张图像有约109个词的字幕；2)每个batch包含多种分辨率和宽高比的图像以扩大有效视觉覆盖；3)采用语义VAE提供更好的潜在表示；4)使用强语言编码器加速优化并实现多语言泛化；5)应用基于分类学的提示强化学习(Lens-RL-8K)和结构化奖励来抑制伪影；6)使用无需训练的系统提示搜索来更好地对齐用户请求；7)基于蒸馏的4步推理加速。
AI.result: Lens在各种基准测试中表现与或超越超过60亿参数的state-of-the-art模型，同时训练计算量显著减少。只需约19.3%的训练计算即可达到类似性能。支持任意宽高比(1:2到2:1)和高达1440²的分辨率，支持多种常用语言的提示。在单张NVIDIA H100 GPU上生成1024²图像仅需3.15秒，加速版本4步生成仅需0.84秒。
AI.conclusion: Lens通过紧凑的38亿参数模型实现了与超过60亿参数模型相当的性能，同时训练计算量显著减少(仅需约19.3%)。该模型支持任意宽高比从1:2到2:1、分辨率高达1440²，并支持多种语言。在NVIDIA H100 GPU上，1024²图像生成时间为3.15秒，加速版本仅需0.84秒。

relevance_reason: 虽然该论文使用了Diffusion模型，但它解决的是文本到图像生成（T2I）的效率和质量问题，完全不同于研究资料中需要的三维运动信息提取与恢复。这个应用领域与从2D视频中提取3D运动、姿态估计、人体动作生成等任务完全不同。该论文关注的是图像生成质量、训练效率和分辨率支持，而非运动捕捉、时序建模或视频先验利用。

title: Emergence of agriculture in an artificial society of reinforcement learning agents
summary: The origin of agriculture represents a major evolutionary transition and a paradigmatic example of how complex collective behaviors emerge from simple interactions. Here we introduce an artificial society of reinforcement learning agents embedded in a dynamic ecological environment to identify general principles underlying this transition. Within this system, agricultural practices emerge spontaneously - without explicit instruction - through the coupled dynamics of learning and environmental modification. We show that this transition is governed by four key ingredients: individual planning through the valuation of delayed rewards, social vulnerability to cheaters, stabilization via social learning, and an emergent lock-in effect that renders agriculture effectively irreversible once established. In particular, we demonstrate that social learning acts as a "firewall" that suppresses cheater invasion and enables the propagation of successful strategies, leading to sustained population growth and nonlinear amplification of domesticated resources. Together, these results reveal universal mechanisms linking individual decision-making, social interactions, and ecological feedbacks. More broadly, they highlight the potential of artificial societies as experimental platforms to study the emergence of cultural innovations and major evolutionary transitions.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了嵌入动态生态环境的强化学习人工社会，探索农业起源这一主要进化转变。农业实践在该系统中自发涌现，由四个关键要素驱动：延迟奖励评估的个人规划、对欺骗者的社会脆弱性、社会学习稳定化、以及使农业不可逆的锁门效应。
AI.motivation: 农业起源是理解复杂集体行为如何从简单交互中涌现的范式案例，但推动这一转变的底层机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建人工社会：使用强化学习agent并将其嵌入动态生态环境，通过学习与环境修改的耦合动力学使农业实践自发涌现。
AI.result: 识别出四个关键governing要素：1）延迟奖励评估的个人规划；2）对欺骗者的社会脆弱性；3）社会学习稳定化；4）emergent锁门效应。社会学习充当"防火墙"抑制欺骗者入侵，使成功策略传播，导致人口增长和驯化资源的非线性放大。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了连接个人决策、社会互动与生态反馈的普适机制；人工社会可作为研究文化创新和major evolutionary transitions的实验平台。

relevance_reason: This paper is about artificial life/evolutionary computing - studying how agricultural practices emerge in a simulated society of RL agents. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The application domain is fundamentally different: it's about evolutionary dynamics and societal behavior emergence, NOT about 3D motion generation, video-based pose estimation, or any computer graphics/pixel/3D motion tasks. The methods (standard RL in artificial societies) have no connection to Diffusion Models, VLM, Video Generation Priors, or 3D Motion Generation models needed for the research profile.

title: The Shape of Testimony: A Scalable Framework for Oral History Archive Comparison
summary: Researchers in Holocaust studies have often distinguished between two styles of oral survivor testimony: the USC Shoah Foundation's interviews tend to follow a structured, interviewer-guided format, whereas the Yale Fortunoff Video Archive generally favors a more free-form, open-ended style. This distinction has influenced both scholarly research and the development of later archives. In this study, we critically examine that claim by conducting a large-scale computational analysis of more than 1,600 testimonies from both collections. Leveraging discourse segmentation, topic modeling, and large language model (LLM) based analysis, we quantify the "structuredness" level of testimonies through topic coherence, interviewer-survivor dynamics, and the distribution of question types. Our results generally corroborate the structural differences identified in earlier research, while also revealing significant overlaps between the collections, both within individual interviews and across common narrative patterns. This complicates the simple "structured vs. free-form" dichotomy often applied to these oral histories. Beyond revisiting a foundational claim in Holocaust studies, our work provides a scalable, replicable framework for comparative corpus analysis. As a proof of concept, it suggests broader applications for digital oral history, narrative analysis, and the design of citizen-science annotation platforms.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过计算方法对1600多份大屠杀幸存者证词进行大规模分析，验证了USC和耶鲁两大档案库在访谈风格上的差异，同时揭示了这种二元划分过于简化，为数字口述历史分析提供了新框架。
AI.motivation: 研究者普遍认为大屠杀研究中存在两种口述证词风格的区分：USC Shoah Foundation采用结构化、访谈者引导的形式，而耶鲁Fortunoff video Archive倾向于更自由的形式。这一观点影响了后续档案建设，但缺乏大规模实证验证。
AI.method: 对两个档案库1600多份证词进行话语分割、主题建模和大语言模型分析，通过主题连贯性、访谈者-幸存者动态和问题的分布来量化证词的"结构化"程度。
AI.result: 结果证实了之前研究识别的结构性差异，但也揭示了两个档案库之间的显著重叠，包括个别访谈和常见叙事模式中的重叠。
AI.conclusion: 简单地用"结构化vs自由形式"的二元对立来描述这些口述历史是不准确的。研究提供了一个可扩展、可复制的比较语料库分析框架，可应用于数字口述历史、叙事分析和公民科学注释平台设计。

relevance_reason: 完全无关。该论文是关于数字口述历史档案分析的领域（使用主题建模和LLM分析大屠杀幸存者证词），与计算机图形学毫无关系。应用领域完全不同：一个是数字人文/计算语言学，一个是计算机图形学中的三维运动生成。使用的技术方法也完全不同：文本主题建模vs扩散模型、姿态估计、视频生成先验等。因此无论从应用领域匹配度还是方法相关性来看，都是最低相关。

title: MindLoom: Composing Thought Modes for Frontier-Level Reasoning Data Synthesis
comment: Work in Progress. Comments: 27 pages, 4 figures, preprint
summary: Although LLMs have made substantial progress in reasoning, systematically producing frontier-level reasoning data remains difficult. Existing synthesis methods often have limited visibility into the structural factors that govern problem difficulty, which can result in narrow diversity and unstable difficulty control. In this work, we view the difficulty of a reasoning problem as arising from the accumulation of atomic knowledge-reasoning transformations, which we term thought modes. Building on this perspective, we propose MindLoom, a framework for synthesizing frontier-level reasoning data through compositional thought mode engineering. Given a collection of hard problems with verified solutions, MindLoom first decomposes those solutions into thought mode chains that reveal each problem's construction logic. It then trains a retrieval model that matches problem states to compatible thought modes, providing guidance on which reasoning challenges to introduce during synthesis. New problems are composed by iteratively applying retrieved thought modes to seed questions, with distribution-aligned sampling to encourage diverse reasoning coverage. Finally, a rollout-based judging stage labels generated questions by difficulty and supplies judged-correct responses for supervised fine-tuning. We evaluate MindLoom on nine benchmarks covering five STEM disciplines and four mathematical reasoning tasks across multiple model families and sizes. Models fine-tuned on MindLoom-generated data achieves favorable performances over base models, distillation, and external-data baselines across the reported benchmarks. Ablation studies indicate the contribution of each component, and further analysis suggests that MindLoom covers a broad range of reasoning patterns while maintaining useful difficulty control. We have open-sourced our implementation at https://github.com/EachSheep/MindLoom.

AI.tldr: MindLoom是一个通过组合思维模式工程合成前沿级推理数据的框架，将问题难度视为原子知识推理转换的累积，通过检索模型匹配问题状态与相容思维模式，迭代应用生成新问题，并在9个基准上取得良好性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成推理数据时对问题难度的结构因素理解有限，导致多样性不足和难度控制不稳定，需要一种更系统的方法来合成高质量的前沿级推理训练数据。
AI.method: MindLoom首先将已有难题分解为揭示问题构建逻辑的思维模式链，然后训练检索模型匹配问题状态与相容思维模式，通过迭代应用检索到的思维模式生成新问题，使用分布对齐采样鼓励多样化推理覆盖，最后通过rollout评判阶段标注难度并提供正确响应用于监督微调。
AI.result: 在涵盖5个STEM学科和4个数学推理任务的9个基准上进行评估，基于MindLoom生成数据微调的模型相比基线模型、蒸馏和外部数据方法取得了更优表现，消融实验表明各组件都有贡献，且覆盖广泛的推理模式同时保持了有效的难度控制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种基于思维模式组合的推理数据合成框架，通过将问题难度分解为原子转换单元实现了更好的难度控制和推理多样性，为大语言模型的推理能力提升提供了新的数据合成范式。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文是关于LLM推理训练数据合成(Method: retrieval models, thought mode engineering)，而研究档案是计算机图形学领域的三维运动生成(Method: diffusion models, pose estimation, temporal modeling)。两者应用领域完全不同——一个是语言模型训练数据，一个是视觉-运动计算。疼痛点也不相关(问题难度控制vs运动提取/质量评估)。

title: Sibyl-AutoResearch: Autonomous Research Needs Self-Evolving Trial-and-Error Harnesses, Not Paper Generators
summary: Autonomous research systems increasingly make the scientific workflow executable: agents can propose ideas, run code, inspect results, and draft papers. But executable workflows do not by themselves produce research judgment. We analyze where current systems lose trial experience: weak evidence becomes prose, pilot signals become broad claims, memory remains textual, and recurring process failures do not change later behavior. We introduce Sibyl-AutoResearch, a self-evolving AutoResearch framework built around Scientific Trial-and-Error Harnesses. A harness lets agents run bounded trials, preserve positive and negative outcomes, and route lessons into later planning, validation, claim scope, scheduling, critique, writing, and harness repair. We formalize this through two auditable conversion units: trial-to-behavior conversion, which links trial signals to later research actions, and trial-to-harness-behavior conversion, which links recurring process failures to system updates. We implement the framework in SIBYL, a file-backed autonomous research system that exposes the state, roles, memory, gates, and artifact traces needed to inspect these conversion paths. A retrospective audit identifies eight high-confidence conversion events, with a median latency of one iteration and a maximum latency of three iterations. A recovered-failure registry further shows how five naturally occurring failure classes, including duplicate results, stale numbers, and unsupported statistics, were blocked, downgraded, or routed into later repair. These traces do not establish a comparative performance claim; they show that the proposed conversion units are recoverable from realistic autonomous-research workspaces. The SIBYL framework and system are available at https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sibyl-AutoResearch框架，解决自主研究中可执行工作流缺乏研究判断的问题，通过Scientific Trial-and-Error Harnesses实现试验到行为的转化，在SIBYL系统中验证了8个高置信度转换事件，证明转换单元可从真实工作空间恢复。
AI.motivation: 解决自主研究系统面临的核心问题：可执行工作流本身不能产生研究判断。具体表现为：弱证据变成散文，飞秒信号变成宽泛声称，记忆保持文本形式， recurring process failures不改变后续行为。
AI.method: 引入Sibyl-AutoResearch框架，基于Scientific Trial-and-Error Harnesses。两个核心转换单元：1) trial-to-behavior conversion（将试验信号链接到后续研究行动）；2) trial-to-harness-behavior conversion（将重复过程失败链接到系统更新）。实现为SIBYL——一个文件支持的自主研究系统。
AI.result: 通过回顾性审计识别了8个高置信度转换事件，中位延迟为1次迭代，最大延迟为3次迭代。恢复失败注册显示5个自然发生的失败类别（包括重复结果、陈旧数字、不支持统计）被阻止、降级或路由到后续修复。
AI.conclusion: 这些痕迹没有建立比较性能声明，但表明所提出的转换单元可以从现实自主研究工作空间中恢复。SIBYL框架和系统可通过GitHub获取。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely unrelated to the research profile. It addresses "autonomous research systems" and "research judgment" in AI/LLM workflows -not computer graphics. The application domain is entirely different: it's about text-based trial-and-error reasoning for research workflows, not 2D video motion extraction, 3D motion generation, pose estimation, diffusion models for visual content, or any computer graphics task. The methods (trial-to-behavior conversion for research systems) have no overlap with diffusion models, VLM for visual quality assessment, video generation priors, pose estimation, or temporal modeling for motion. This belongs to AI/ML systems research, not Computer Graphics.

title: Flat-Pack Bench: Evaluating Spatio-Temporal Understanding in Large Vision-Language Models through Furniture Assembly
summary: The emergence of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has significantly advanced video understanding capabilities. However, existing benchmarks focus predominantly on coarse-grained tasks such as action segmentation, classification, captioning, and retrieval. Furthermore, these benchmarks often rely on entities that can be easily identified verbally, like household objects, animals, human subjects, etc., limiting their applicability to complex, in-the-wild video scenarios. But, many applications such as furniture assembly, cooking, etc., require step-by-step fine-grained spatio-temporal understanding of the video, which is not sufficiently evaluated in current benchmarks. To address this gap, we introduce Flat-Pack Bench, a novel benchmark centered on furniture assembly tasks. Our benchmark evaluates LVLMs on nuanced tasks, including temporal ordering of assembly actions, temporal localization of assembly state, understanding part mating, and tracking, using multiple-choice questions paired with visual prompts highlighting relevant parts as references for fine-grained questions. Our experiments reveal that state-of-the-art LVLMs struggle significantly with fine-grained spatio-temporal reasoning, highlighting their limitations in effectively leveraging temporal information from videos, limited tracking ability, and understanding of spatial interactions like physical contact.

AI.tldr: 论文介绍了Flat-Pack Bench基准测试，用于评估大型视觉语言模型在家具装配任务中的细粒度时空推理能力。该基准测试评估时间顺序、状态定位、零件配合理解和跟踪等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注粗粒度任务（如动作分割、分类、标题和检索），且依赖容易被语言描述的实体（如家庭物品、动物、人类主体），无法应用于复杂的真实世界视频场景。许多应用（如家具装配、烹饪）需要步骤化的细粒度时空理解，但当前基准测试未能充分评估这一能力。
AI.method: 引入Flat-Pack Bench基准测试，以家具装配任务为中心，通过多项选择题配合视觉提示来评估LVLMs，包括：装配动作的时间排序、装配状态的时空定位、零件配合理解和跟踪等细粒度任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，最先进的LVLMs在细粒度时空推理方面存在显著困难，揭示了它们在有效利用视频时间信息、有限跟踪能力以及理解物理接触等空间交互方面的局限性。
AI.conclusion: Flat-Pack Bench基准测试成功揭示了当前LVLMs在处理复杂细粒度时空推理任务时的能力不足，为未来模型改进提供了有价值的评估框架。

relevance_reason: 虽然该论文涉及VLMs和时空推理评估，但其应用领域是家具装配任务的视觉语言模型基准测试，与计算机图形学中的3D人体运动生成完全无关。论文没有涉及扩散模型、姿态估计、三维运动生成或视频先验等方法。核心研究问题也不同：一个关注家具装配的时空理解评估，另一个关注从2D视频中恢复3D运动信息和生成自然动作。这篇论文属于AI/VLM评估领域，而非计算机图形学或运动生成领域。

title: A Generalized Nash Equilibrium-Seeking Scheme for Trauma Resuscitation
summary: Trauma resuscitation is a clinical process for treating life-threatening physiological disorders in safety-critical environments, driven by the experience of healthcare workers (HCWs). Designing and optimizing quantifiable metrics that accurately capture HCW decisions may augment current resuscitation procedures with the potential to improve patient outcomes. This motivates our socio-technical formulation of trauma resuscitation as a distributed generalized Nash equilibrium (GNE)-seeking game with coupled inequality constraints. This method is optimized over a time-varying communication graph. We introduce novel insights from clinical experience to model HCWs behavior. This work facilitates the best possible resuscitation outcome given HCWs workloads, schedules, competencies, and limited resources.

AI.tldr: 本文将创伤复苏建模为分布式广义纳什均衡(GNE)寻求博弈问题，通过时变通信图优化医疗工作者的决策行为，以提高患者预后。
AI.motivation: 当前创伤复苏程序缺乏对医护人员决策行为的量化度量标准，设计能够准确捕捉医护人员决策的可量化指标可能有助于改善患者预后结果。
AI.method: 提出一种 socio-technical 方法，将创伤复苏建模为具有耦合不等式约束的分布式广义纳什均衡(GNE)寻求博弈，并在时变通信图上进行优化。
AI.result: 该方法结合临床经验建模医护人员行为，考虑其工作量、日程安排、能力和有限资源，以获得最佳复苏效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过游戏理论和优化方法的结合，为创伤复苏提供了一种新的量化分析框架，有潜力改善安全关键环境下的临床治疗效果。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical trauma resuscitation and game theory (Generalized Nash Equilibrium seeking for healthcare decision-making). There is no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video processing, diffusion models, pose estimation, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is healthcare/medical, not computer graphics.

title: Investigating Concept Alignment Using Implausible Category Members
summary: Developing AI systems with a human-like understanding of everyday concepts is a key step towards developing safe, reliable systems whose behavior makes sense to humans. When probing concept understanding, asking questions about plausible category members (e.g., "Is a car a vehicle?") is likely to recall patterns in the model's vast training data. We pursue an alternative strategy, characterizing the boundaries of conceptual categories by asking about implausible category members (e.g., "Is an olive a vehicle?") to probe the kind of concept-level knowledge we take for granted in fellow humans. We characterize concept boundaries for a set of fundamental concepts by studying AI systems' assignments of objects to superordinate categories from a classic psychological study by Rosch and Mervis, as well as their assignments of the same objects to mismatched superordinate categories. We compare these assignments to those made by human participants on the full range of within-category and cross-category assignment tasks. Our results reveal a range of concepts for which which models differ in meaningful and surprising ways from humans, including treating "words" as belonging to categories like "vehicles" and "clothing," identifying several "vegetable" category members as "fruit," and assigning exemplars from non-weapon categories to the "weapons" category. We also demonstrate how these instances of concept misalignment translate into problematic downstream behavior with implications for AI safety.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过测试AI对不合理类别成员（如"橄榄是车辆吗？"）的分类来探测概念理解能力，发现AI在多个概念上与人类存在显著差异，这些错位会导致安全问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI理解日常概念的能力仍是安全可靠系统的关键挑战。现有方法询问合理类别成员（如"汽车是交通工具吗？"）可能只是召回训练数据中的模式，无法真正探测概念层面的理解。研究希望采用新策略——用不合理成员（如"橄榄是交通工具吗？"）来探测概念边界，这与人类对概念的基本理解进行对比。
AI.method: 使用Rosch和Mervis经典心理学研究中关于基本概念的类别体系，研究AI将物体分配给超级类别（上位类别）和不匹配超级类别的任务，并与人类在同类跨类别分配任务上的表现进行比较。
AI.result: 研究发现AI在多个概念上与人类存在出乎意料的差异：1）将"词语"归类为"车辆"和"服装"等类别；2）将某些"蔬菜"成员识别为"水果"；3）将非武器类别的样本分配到"武器"类别。
AI.conclusion: AI系统的概念错位会转化为有问题的下游行为，对AI安全具有重要启示。这意味着仅依赖大规模训练的模式匹配不足以实现类似人类的概念理解，需要更根本的概念表示方法。

relevance_reason: 该论文研究AI概念对齐和安全问题(例如"橄榄是否是车辆"),完全不涉及计算机图形学、三维运动生成、姿态估计、视频生成先验或时间建模。该论文属于AI安全/认知科学领域,与Research Profile中描述的计算机图形学运动生成研究方向完全无关。

title: Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Systems via Decentralized Memory
summary: Self-evolving multi-agent systems (MAS) have emerged as a promising route to LLM agents that continually improve from experience, with persistent memory at their foundation. However, existing designs almost exclusively adopt a centralized repository shared across agents, incurring communication and coordination overhead, raising privacy concerns, and collapsing agent diversity. We propose DecentMem, a decentralized memory framework in which each agent maintains its own dual-pool memory -- an exploitation pool of consolidated past trajectories and an exploration pool of LLM-generated candidates for unseen contexts. The two pools are reweighted online based on stage-wise feedback from an LLM-as-a-judge. Theoretically, we prove that this design guarantees global reachability of the solution space and achieves $O(\log T)$ cumulative regret, matching the stochastic bandit lower bound up to constants. In practice, across three MAS frameworks (AutoGen, DyLAN, AgentNet), three Qwen3 backbones (4B/8B/14B), two Gemma4 backbones (E2B/E4B) and five benchmarks spanning math, code, QA, and embodied tasks, DecentMem improves average accuracy by up to 23.8% over the strongest centralized memory baseline and by up to 52.5% over the no-memory baseline, while reducing token usage by up to 49%.

AI.tldr: 提出DecentMem，一个去中心化记忆框架，每个智能体维护自己的双池内存（利用池和探索池），通过LLM作为评判者进行在线重加权，在理论上证明全局可达性和O(log T)的累积遗憾，在实践中在多个框架和基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自进化多智能体系统大多采用集中式共享仓库，导致通信协调开销、隐私问题和智能体多样性丧失。
AI.method: 每个智能体维护双池内存：利用池存储已巩固的轨迹，探索池存储LLM生成的未知上下文候选；基于LLM-as-a-judge的阶段反馈进行在线重加权。
AI.result: 在三个MAS框架、两个模型家族、五个基准上，相比最强baseline提升23.8%准确率，相比无内存base提升52.5%，token使用降低49%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的去中心化设计是有效的，在保持智能体多样性的同时实现了理论保证和实践性能的双重突破。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于多智能体系统(Multi-Agent Systems)的，与计算机图形学完全无关。论文使用的方法(LLM作为智能体评判者、双池记忆机制)也与研究要求中的扩散模型、姿态估计、时间建模、视频生成先验等方法完全不同。虽然都涉及LLM，但该论文将LLM用于智能体协调，而非视觉质量评估或三维运动生成。因此该论文与研究配置文件中提到的任何痛点(2D视频三维运动提取、VLM质量评估、视觉特征与三维运动对齐、动作自然性、视频噪声影响)都没有关联。这是完全不同的应用领域。

title: The Impact of AI Usage and Informativeness on Skill Development in Logical Reasoning
comment: Accepted at Hybrid Human Artificial Intelligence (HHAI) 2026
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is being increasingly integrated into human problem-solving, yet its effects on individual skill development remain unclear. We examine how both AI usage and informativeness can shape learning in the context of a controlled logical reasoning task with on-demand access to AI assistance. We find that greater AI usage is associated with weaker skill development: heavy AI users underperform relative to comparable peers, whereas light AI users perform similarly to matched users who do not use AI. We also find in our study that these patterns are mediated by AI informativeness. Low-information AI neither improves immediate performance nor preserves performance after AI assistance is removed, and is linked to weaker learning overall. On the other hand, high-information AI was found to improve short-run performance without reducing post-AI outcomes on average in our experiments, but with heterogeneous effects. Our findings in general suggest that AI can, depending on context, either complement human skill development by amplifying independent reasoning or can act as a substitute that undermines such reasoning, with the implication that regulating AI access and usage will be important for promoting skill development in the presence of AI assistance.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨AI协助对人类技能发展的影响。研究发现，过度依赖AI会削弱技能习得，而低信息量的AI助手既无法改善即时表现也无法在移除后维持表现；高信息量AI可提升短期表现但效果因人而异。结论：AI可能互补或替代人类技能发展，需审慎管理AI获取与使用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI日益整合到人类问题解决中，研究旨在厘清AI使用及AI信息丰富度对个体技能发展的具体影响，特别是AI是增强还是削弱人类独立推理能力。
AI.method: 设计受控的逻辑推理任务，允许参与者按需使用AI辅助，通过比较不同AI使用程度的参与者在任务中的表现及移除AI后的学习成效进行实证检验。
AI.result: 1. 重度AI使用者表现反而不如对照组，形成「依赖诅咒」；2. 轻度AI使用者表现近似无AI辅助者；3. 低信息量AI 既不提升即时表现，移除后表现亦下滑，整体学习效果更差；4. 高信息量AI 可改善短期表现，但移除后结果因个体差异而异质。
AI.conclusion: AI对技能发展的影响取决于使用情境——AI既可通过放大独立推理来补充人类技能，亦可能因替代思考而削弱技能习得。该研究暗示：在AI辅助环境下，促进技能发展需要适度监管AI的获取与使用方式。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文属于教育学/认知科学领域，研究AI对人类逻辑推理技能发展的影响，与计算机图形学的三维运动生成、视频生成、姿态估计等应用方向完全不同。虽然都涉及AI，但应用场景和目标完全不同，因此相关性为0。

title: Trace2Skill: Verifier-Guided Skill Evolution for Long-Context EDA Agents
summary: Complex Verilog Design Problems (CVDP) challenge hardware LLM agents because solving them requires localizing verifier-relevant RTL, testbenches, include paths, and build dependencies inside large repository snapshots, making precise edits, and recovering from sparse hidden-verifier failures. We present Trace2Skill, a test-time scaling framework that improves a hardware agent without RTL-specialized model fine-tuning. Rather than training a new model or only sampling more candidate solutions, Trace2Skill treats the agent's natural-language skill as an evolvable policy. It mines repeated rollout traces for success and failure modes, converts them into dense diagnostics and oracle lessons, and uses an oracle, mutator, and selector loop to produce task-specific skills that guide later search, editing, validation, and recovery. Because final pass/fail labels are often too coarse for hard failures, Trace2Skill also supports bounded runtime dense verifier feedback that returns sanitized functional observations while keeping hidden harnesses and reference solutions inaccessible to the agent. This feedback helps guide skill evolution and agent execution by connecting skill text, verifier evidence, and downstream behavior. Across hard CVDP tasks that defeat the seed CVDP agent, including tasks that also defeat frontier coding agents, Trace2Skill with dense verifier feedback substantially improves task pass rates and produces breakthrough passes on previously unsolved tasks, without requiring high-quality fine-tuning data, specialized RTL model training, or model weight updates. The same framework provides a general test-time scaling strategy that can extend beyond digital design to other verifiable EDA tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Trace2Skill，一种测试时扩展框架，通过挖掘rollout轨迹中的成功/失败模式，将其转换为密集诊断和oracle教训，使用oracle-mutator-selector循环生成任务特定技能，并通过有界运行时密集验证器反馈指导技能演化，无需RTL专业化模型微调即可显著提升硬件LLM智能体解决复杂Verilog设计问题的能力。
AI.motivation: CVDP问题要求智能体在大型仓库快照中定位验证器相关RTL、testbench、include路径和构建依赖，进行精确编辑，并从稀疏隐藏验证器故障中恢复。最终pass/fail标签对于困难失败过于粗糙，需要更细粒度的反馈来指导技能演化和智能体执行。
AI.method: Trace2Skill框架：1)将智能体自然语言技能视为可演化策略；2)从重复 rollout 中挖掘成功和失败模式；3)转换为密集诊断和 oracle 教训；4)使用oracle、mutator和selector循环生成任务特定技能；5)支持有界运行时密集验证器反馈，返回消毒的功能观察同时保持隐藏 harness 和参考解决方案不可访问。
AI.result: 在击败种子CVDP智能体的困难CVDP任务上（包括也击败前沿编码智能体的任务），Trace2Skill结合密集验证器反馈显著提高了任务通过率，并在之前未解决的任务上实现了突破性通过。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种通用的测试时扩展策略，可扩展到数字设计之外的其他可验证EDA任务，无需模型权重更新、RTL专业微调或新训练即可显著提高任务通过率，并在之前无法解决的任务上实现突破性通过。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文是关于硬件设计自动化(EDA)和Verilog代码生成的LLM智能体研究，属于电子设计自动化/软件工程领域；而研究档案要求的是计算机图形学，具体是2D视频到3D人体运动生成、视频生成、姿态估计等。虽然研究档案提到VLM，但该论文的VLM应用场景完全不同。且两者在应用领域、方法论目标和技术问题上没有任何交集。

title: Latent-space Attacks for Refusal Evasion in Language Models
summary: Safety-aligned language models are trained to refuse harmful requests, yet refusal behavior can be suppressed by steering their internal representations. Existing methods do so by ablating a refusal direction from model activations, aiming to remove refusal from the model's residual stream. Despite their empirical success, these methods lack a principled account of the latent-space transformation they induce and why it suppresses refusal. In this work, we recast refusal suppression as a latent-space evasion attack against linear probes trained to separate refused from answered prompts. Under this view, prior work's difference-in-means direction naturally defines such a probe, and its ablation is exactly a projection onto its decision boundary, i.e., a minimum-confidence evasion attack. This perspective not only explains the empirical success of prior work but also admits a key limitation: evasion stops at the decision boundary, motivating the need to push representations further into the compliant region, i.e., where the model answers. We leverage this by proposing a Controlled Latent-space Evasion attack that projects representations past the boundary with an optimized confidence. We achieve state-of-the-art attack success rate across 15 instruction-tuned, multimodal, and reasoning models, outperforming existing refusal-ablation baselines and specialized jailbreak attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文将安全对齐语言模型的拒绝抑制重新定义为针对线性探测器的潜在空间规避攻击，揭示了先前方法的本质是一个最小置信度规避攻击，并提出受控潜在空间攻击来进一步推进表示进入合规区域，在15个模型上实现了最先进的攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有拒绝抑制方法缺乏对潜在空间变换的原理性解释，不知道为什么消融拒绝方向能成功抑制拒绝。此外，规避攻击在决策边界处停止，无法完全确保模型回答。
AI.method: 将拒绝 suppression重新建模为linear probe evasion attack，提出Controlled Latent-space Evasion (CLE) attack，通过优化置信度将表示投影过决策边界进入合规区域。
AI.result: 在15个instruction-tuned、multimodal和reasoning模型上实现了state-of-the-art攻击成功率优于现有的拒绝消融基线和专门的jailbreak攻击。
AI.conclusion: 本文的理论框架统一解释了现有拒绝抑制方法成功的原因并揭示了其局限性，通过引入CLE attack推进 representations进入更深层的合规区域来提升攻击效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI security and jailbreak attacks on language models (LLM refusal evasion), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. While both mention "diffusion," this paper doesn't actually use diffusion models - it focuses on linear probe evasion attacks on LLMs. The application domain is entirely different: text-based LLM safety alignment vs 3D motion generation from 2D videos. There is zero overlap in field, methods, or application domain.

title: MRecover: A Conditional Generative Model for Recovering Motion-Corrupted MR images Using AI Generated Contrast
summary: Hippocampal subfield segmentation requires high-resolution T2w turbo spin echo (TSE) MRI, yet this sequence is susceptible to motion artifacts, leading to substantial data loss. We developed a conditional generative model (MRecover) that synthesizes routinely acquired T1w images to create TSE images with autoregressive slice conditioning for volumetric consistency. Trained on 7T MRI data (n=577), the model achieved high in-domain fidelity (n=148, SSIM=0.84, FSIM=0.94) and generalized well to out-of-domain 3T data: subfield volumes from synthesized and the as-acquired images closely matched: (n=416, r=0.87-0.97) and yielded 31.8% more analyzable subjects in the motion-affected ADNI3 dataset after quality control (593 vs 450). The synthesized images also achieved larger effect sizes due to increasing the sample size for diagnostic group differences in hippocampal subfield atrophy (whole hippocampus $ε^2$= 0.121-0.100 vs. 0.086-0.062, left-right hemispheres). Project page: https://jinghangli98.github.io/MRecover/

AI.tldr: 针对T2w TSE MRI运动伪影问题，开发MRecover条件生成模型，从T1w图像合成T2w TSE图像，实现高保真度并显著提高可分析样本量和效应量。
AI.motivation: 海马体亚区分割需要高分辨率T2加权TSE MRI，但该序列容易受到运动伪影影响，导致大量数据丢失。
AI.method: 开发了条件生成模型(MRecover)，合成常规采集的T1w图像来创建TSE图像，使用自回归切片调节确保体积一致性。在7T MRI数据上训练(n=577)。
AI.result: 域内高保真度(n=148, SSIM=0.84, FSIM=0.94)；域外3T数据泛化良好，合成与实际采集的海马体亚区体积密切匹配(n=416, r=0.87-0.97)；ADNI3数据集增加31.8%可分析受试者(593 vs 450)；增大诊断组差异效应量(整个海马体ε²=0.121-0.100 vs 0.086-0.062)。
AI.conclusion: MRecover可有效从常规T1w图像合成高质量T2w TSE图像，解决运动伪影导致的数据缺失问题，为海马体亚区分析提供可行方案。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的应用领域。该论文是医学影像学（MRI运动伪影修复）而非计算机图形学（人体动作生成/视频到3D动作恢复）。虽然该论文使用了条件生成模型，但其应用目标是生成医学T2加权MRI图像，与研究概要中的2D视频三维运动信息提取、VLM质量评估、姿态估计、人体动作自然性等核心问题毫无关联。即使方法层面都使用diffusion model，医学MRI图像生成与人体动作生成是截然不同的应用领域。

title: AI-Enabled Serious Games: Integrating Intelligence and Adaptivity in Training Systems
comment: Book chapter, 1 figure. To appear in "Advances in Global Applied Artificial Intelligence," G. A. Tsihrintzis, M. Virvou, N. G. Bourbakis, and L. C. Jain (Eds.), Springer, Learning and Analytics in Intelligent Systems book series, 2026
summary: Serious games are widely used for learning and training across domains such as healthcare, defense, and education. Persistent challenges remain, however, including static scenario design, authoring bottlenecks, limited learner modeling, and difficulty implementing meaningful real-time instructional adaptation. Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) introduce novel capabilities such as dynamic scenario variation, contextual feedback, adaptive pacing, and learner-state modeling that may help address some of these limitations. At the same time, integrating AI into serious games raises important questions related to validity, transparency, system control, and learner trust. This chapter examines how contemporary AI approaches may support real-time instructional adaptation in serious games. It distinguishes between instructional intelligence, defined as a system's capacity to infer learner knowledge and reason about pedagogically appropriate responses, and adaptivity, defined as the ability to modify instructional actions during interaction. A historical synthesis of adaptive learning systems is presented, tracing developments from early computer-assisted instruction through intelligent tutoring systems (ITS), dynamic difficulty adjustment (DDA), authoring platforms, learning analytics, and recent AI-enabled architectures. Building on this perspective, the chapter discusses how large language models (LLMs), reinforcement learning (RL), and agent-based architectures may contribute to more integrated forms of intelligence and adaptivity in serious games. It also highlights practical and research challenges associated with AI-enabled systems, including explainability, validation, computational cost, and the limited empirical evidence regarding long-term learning outcomes in AI-enabled serious games.

AI.tldr: 本章探讨人工智能如何支持严肃游戏中的实时教学适应性，涵盖从早期计算机辅助教学到智能辅导系统、动态难度调整，再到大型语言模型、强化学习和基于Agent的架构的发展历程，并分析相关挑战。
AI.motivation: 严肃游戏在学习培训领域应用广泛，但面临静态场景设计、创作瓶颈、学习者建模不足和实时教学适应困难等挑战。AI技术进步为解决这些问题提供了新机遇，但同时也引发关于有效性、透明性、系统控制和信任的问题。
AI.method: 历史性综合研究方法，回顾自适应学习系统的发展脉络，从早期计算机辅助教学→智能辅导系统(ITS)→动态难度调整(DDA)→创作平台→学习分析→近期AI驱动架构，并讨论LLM、RL和基于Agent的架构潜力。
AI.result: 界定了教学智能(推理学习者知识并提供适当教学响应的能力)和适应性(交互过程中修改教学行为的能力)两个核心概念；梳理了AI在严肃游戏中应用的技术演进；识别了可解释性、验证、计算成本和长期学习效果实证证据有限等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: AI技术特别是LLM、RL和Agent架构有潜力推动更集成的智能和适应性，但需解决可解释性、验证和计算成本等问题，目前AI驱动严肃游戏的长期学习效果实证证据仍有限，需要更多研究验证。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的领域。该论文是关于AI在严肃游戏/教育培训中的应用（自适应学习系统、智能辅导系统、动态难度调整），而研究档案要求的是计算机图形学中的三维人体运动生成技术。两个领域的应用场景完全不同：一个是教育技术/学习系统，另一个是计算机图形学/动作生成。此外，该论文采用的是历史文献综述方法，而非所需的具体技术方法（Diffusion Models、VLM、视频生成先验、姿态估计等）。应用域和方法都完全不匹配。

title: AttuneBench: A Conversation-Based Benchmark for LLM Emotional Intelligence
summary: Emotional intelligence (EI), the ability to perceive, understand, and respond appropriately to others' emotional states, is central to human communication, and increasingly important to assess as LLMs assume conversational roles in everyday life. Existing EI benchmarks rely on synthetic prompts, single-turn cases, or third-party annotation. These approaches do not directly measure how models infer and respond to a participant's emotional state over the course of a real conversation. We introduce AttuneBench, a benchmark grounded in 200 genuine multi-turn human-model conversations in which participants conversed with anonymized LLMs and provided turn-by-turn annotations of their emotional state, the model's behavior, and their preferred responses. Across 11 evaluated models, we find that model rankings on emotion recognition, behavioral classification, preference prediction, and judged response quality are largely independent, indicating that emotionally intelligent behavior decomposes into separable capabilities. Preference alignment and response-quality judgments are substantially more model-discriminating than emotion-label accuracy. These results indicate that emotionally intelligent behavior requires predicting what kind of response a specific user wants in context, a distinction that aggregate scoring can obscure and that single-turn or synthetic formats cannot directly capture across turns. AttuneBench provides a framework for assessing each of these capabilities and for diagnosing model-specific strengths and failure modes in emotionally salient conversation.

AI.tldr: 介绍AttuneBench基准，用于评估LLM的情绪智能，基于200个真实的多轮人机对话，参与者提供逐轮标注。评估了11个模型，发现情绪智能行为可分解为独立的能力维度，且偏好对齐和响应质量判断比情绪识别更具区分度。
AI.motivation: 现有EI基准存在局限：使用合成提示、单轮案例或第三方标注，无法直接测量模型在真实对话过程中如何推断和响应参与者的情绪状态。随着LLM在日常生活中承担对话角色，能够准确感知和回应用户情绪变得越来越重要。
AI.method: 构建AttuneBench，包含200个真实的多轮人类-LLM对话。参与者与匿名LLM对话并逐轮标注自己的情绪状态、模型行为和首选响应。评估11个模型在情绪识别、行为分类、偏好预测和响应质量判断四个维度的表现。
AI.result: 模型在各能力维度上的排名基本独立，表明情绪智能行为可分解为独立能力。偏好对齐和响应质量判断比情绪标签准确率更具模型区分度。情绪智能行为需要预测特定用户在上下文中的具体需求，而聚合评分会掩盖这一差异。
AI.conclusion: AttuneBench提供了一个评估各能力的框架，可诊断模型在情感丰富对话中的特定优势和失败模式。单轮或合成格式无法直接捕捉跨轮互动中的情绪智能表现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating emotional intelligence in LLMs through conversation-based benchmarks - completely different field from Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from video (using diffusion models, pose estimation, temporal modeling), while this paper is about NLP/conversational AI. While both mention "VLM", the research profile's VLM is for visual quality assessment, whereas this paper uses LLM for emotional intelligence in dialogues. There is zero application domain match and the methods are entirely different (benchmark evaluation vs motion generation).

title: AVI-HT: Adaptive Vision-IMU Fusion for 3D Hand Tracking
summary: We present AVI-HT, an adaptive visual-IMU fusion approach for tracking 3D hand poses by jointly modeling the egocentric image with on-glove 6-DoF IMU signals. AVI-HT achieves significantly improved accuracy and availability, particularly in hand-object interaction (HOI) scenarios involving heavy visual occlusion. Two complementary ingredients underpin its success: (1) synchronized multi-modal training data pairing on-body vision-IMU sensor streams with ground-truth 3D hand poses from a motion-capture system, and (2) a cross-sensor deep attention mechanism that adaptively modulates the trust assigned to the vision and individual IMU sensors. To evaluate AVI-HT in real-world settings, we conduct extensive experiments on our DexGloveHOI dataset that consists of 100K+ pairwise vision-IMU samples with synchronized 3D annotated poses, in which users manipulate a variety of objects during daily tasks. We compare against multiple single- and multi-modal tracking approaches under two hand models (UmeTrack, MANO). The results show that AVI-HT reduces mean keypoint error by 16.1% and its wrist-aligned variant by 24.2% over the baselines. Ablation studies further reveal the per-finger contribution of IMU sensors across activity types, and the model's sensitivity to IMU noise and temporal misalignment in vision-IMU fusion.

AI.tldr: AVI-HT是一种自适应视觉-IMU融合方法，用于跟踪3D手部姿态，通过结合自我中心图像与手套上的6自由度IMU信号。该方法利用同步多模态训练数据和跨传感器深度注意力机制，在DexGloveHOI数据集（包含100K+样本）上进行评估，显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在涉及严重视觉遮挡的手-物体交互(HOI)场景中，跟踪3D手部姿态是一个具有挑战性的问题。单纯依赖视觉的方法在遮挡条件下性能下降明显，需要融合其他传感器信息来提高准确性和可用性。
AI.method: AVI-HT采用两个核心组件：(1)同步多模态训练数据，将穿戴式视觉-IMU传感器流与动捕系统的真实3D手部姿态配对；(2)跨传感器深度注意力机制，自适应调节对视觉和各个IMU传感器的信任权重。在DexGloveHOI数据集上进行了广泛实验，比较了两种手部模型(UmeTrack和MANO)下的单模态和多模态跟踪方法。
AI.result: AVI-HT将平均关键点误差降低了16.1%，其手腕对齐变体降低了24.2%，优于所有基线方法。消融研究进一步揭示了IMU传感器在各活动类型中的按手指贡献，以及模型对IMU噪声和时间不对齐的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 通过视觉和IMU数据的自适应融合，AVI-HT成功提高了HOI场景中的跟踪准确性和可用性。这种跨传感器注意力机制能够有效处理视觉遮挡问题，为手部姿态跟踪提供了一种健壮且高效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Mismatch in both application domain and methods. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D videos using Diffusion Models, VLM, and video generation priors. This paper is about IMU-vision sensor fusion for 3D hand tracking - it requires additional hardware (IMU sensors) rather than extracting motion purely from video. While hand tracking relates to pose estimation, the core technology (IMU fusion) is fundamentally different from the video-only approaches in the profile. Also focuses on hand tracking, not general human motion generation.

title: The Log is the Agent: Event-Sourced Reactive Graphs for Auditable, Forkable Agentic Systems
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure. Open-source Apache-2.0 implementation with reproducible quickstart demo, deterministic replay, fork-and-diff, and lineage tracing
summary: Most agent frameworks are built around the language model: a conversation loop comes first, then tools, then rules, and finally a logging layer bolted on for observability, with state persisted as retrievable "memory." We describe ActiveGraph, a runtime that inverts this arrangement. The append-only event log is the source of truth; the working graph is a deterministic projection of that log; and behaviors--ordinary functions, classes, LLM-backed routines, or logic attached to typed edges--react to changes in the graph and emit new events. No component instructs another; coordination happens entirely through the shared graph. This single design decision yields three properties that retrieval-and-summarization memory systems do not provide: deterministic replay of any run from its log, cheap forking that branches a run at any event without re-executing the shared prefix, and end-to-end lineage from a high-level goal down to the individual model call that produced each artifact. We present the architecture, a determinism contract that makes replay sound, and a worked diligence example whose full causal structure is reconstructable from the log alone. We discuss--without claiming to demonstrate--why this substrate is unusually well suited to self-improving agents, and how it extends the BabyAGI lineage and prior graph-memory research.

AI.tldr: ActiveGraph 是一个将事件日志作为真相来源的运行时系统，传统架构以语言模型和对话循环为核心，而 ActiveGraph 将其反转。该系统使工作图成为日志的确定性投影，行为组件响应图变化并发出新事件，通过共享图而非直接指令进行协调。这一设计产生了检索-摘要记忆系统不具备的三个关键特性：运行的确定性重放、廉价分叉（无需重新执行共享前缀）以及从高级目标到单个模型调用的端到端沿袭。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体框架大多围绕语言模型构建：对话循环优先，然后是工具、规则，最后才是可观测性的日志层，状态以"记忆"形式持久化。这种架构存在根本缺陷——无法提供确定性重放、廉价分支和完整因果沿袭能力。检索和摘要式记忆系统无法满足自主智能体对可解释性、可复现性和自我改进的需求。
AI.method: ActiveGraph 采用反向架构设计：(1) 追加写事件日志作为真相唯一来源；(2) 工作图是该日志的确定性投影；(3) 行为组件（包括普通函数、类、LLM支持的例程或附于类型化边的逻辑）响应图变化并发出新事件。核心机制是避免任何组件直接指令其他组件，所有协调完全通过共享图完成，并设有确定性合约确保重放的可靠性。
AI.result: 该单一设计决策产生了三个检索-摘要记忆系统无法提供的特性：① 任意运行的事件日志确定性重放；② 廉价分叉可在任意事件处分支运行，而无需重新执行共享前缀；③ 从高级目标到生成每个制品的单个模型调用的端到端谱系追踪。文章还展示了一个完整的勤奋示例，其因果结构可从日志单独重建。
AI.conclusion: 该基质特别适合自改进智能体，因为它提供了完整的执行历史和因果关系追溯能力。ActiveGraph 扩展了 BabyAGI 系列和先前的图记忆研究，为构建更具可控性和自我反思能力的智能体系统奠定了基础。虽然文中讨论但未 демонстрировать 这些能力，表明这仍是一项概念性工作，需要进一步实现和验证。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于AI智能体系统的软件架构设计（ActiveGraph的事件溯源框架），与计算机图形学完全无关。研究目标是实现智能体的确定性重放廉价分叉和沿袭追踪，与2D视频中提取3D运动、VLM质量评估、姿态估计、扩散模型生成动作等研究痛点无任何交集。应用领域、方法技术、目标场景完全不同。

title: BEiTScore: Reference-free Image Captioning Evaluation with an Efficient Cross-Encoder Model
summary: Image captioning evaluation remains a significant challenge, as vision-language models evolve toward more challenging capabilities such as generating long-form and context-rich descriptions. State-of-the-art evaluation metrics involve extensive computational costs associated with the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as judges, or instead suffer from the limitations of standard CLIP-based encoders, such as strict token limits, lack of fine-grained sensitivity, or lack of compositional generalization by treating captions as ``bags-of-words.'' We propose a new learned metric that tackles the aforementioned challenges, based on a lightweight cross-encoder that is initialized from a visual question-answering model checkpoint, balancing a strong weight initialization with computational efficiency. Our training scheme uses a carefully assembled data mixture for supervised learning, featuring adversarial LLM-based data augmentations to enhance model sensitivity to fine-grained visual-linguistic errors. We also introduce a new benchmark designed to assess detailed captioning evaluation across diverse scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed metric achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining the efficiency required for large-scale benchmarking, quality-aware decoding, or reward guidance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从VQA模型初始化的轻量级跨编码器图像字幕评估指标，通过对抗性LLM数据增强提升细粒度错误检测能力，在新基准测试上达到先进性能且保持高效。
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕评估指标存在局限性：基于CLIP的编码器存在严格token限制、缺乏细粒度敏感性和组合泛化能力（将字幕视为词袋），而基于LLM的评判方法计算成本过高。
AI.method: 提出了一种从VQA模型检查点初始化的轻量级跨编码器评估指标，训练采用精心设计的数据混合和对抗性LLM数据增强策略，并构建了新的详细字幕评估基准测试。
AI.result: 提出的评估指标在新基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了计算效率，可用于大规模基准测试、质量感知解码和奖励引导。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过轻量级跨编码器和LLM数据增强策略，有效提升了细粒度错误检测能力，在新基准测试上达到了最先进的性能，同时保持了较低的计算开销，适用于大规模基准测试和质量感知解码等场景。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的领域。该论文是关于图像字幕(Image Captioning)评估，属于计算机视觉+自然语言处理领域，与研究 profile 中的计算机图形学/三维人体动作生成完全不同。应用域不匹配：需要的是从2D视频生成3D动作的技术，而论文是评估图像字幕的质量。虽然两者都使用了VLM（视觉语言模型），但应用场景完全不同。方法也不相关：论文使用cross-encoder进行caption评估，与motion generation、pose estimation、temporal modeling无关。

title: Cross-domain benchmarks reveal when coordinated AI agents improve scientific inference from partial evidence
summary: Scientific evidence often spans instruments, databases, and disciplines, so no single source records the full phenomenon. This makes it difficult to determine when coordinated AI agents add value over simpler scientific workflows. We evaluate this question with a cross-domain benchmark spanning four scientific tasks: mapping molecular structure into musical representations, detecting historical paradigm shifts in science, identifying vector-borne disease emergence, and vetting transiting-exoplanet candidates. Each case uses a frozen evaluation panel, predefined scoring protocols, explicit baselines, ablations or null controls, and stated limitations. The results define three operating regimes. When different disciplines each capture only part of the phenomenon, cross-channel composites improve over single-channel baselines: climate-vector emergence reaches AUROC 0.944 and exoplanet vetting reaches AUROC 0.955. However, the exoplanet workflow is effectively tied with a strong combined-summary baseline, showing that decomposition does not always improve top-line performance. When one signal dominates, as in paradigm-shift detection, coordination mainly improves interpretation and traceability. For molecular sonification, the gain is representational rather than predictive. ScienceClaw x Infinite provides the auditable artifact and provenance layer for this evaluation. The benchmark therefore assigns value to coordination only when the corresponding performance, provenance, or representation claim is supported by explicit comparators.

AI.tldr: 一篇评估跨领域协调AI智能体价值的论文，通过四个科学任务（分子结构音乐化、范式转变检测、疾病 emergence发现、系外行星筛选）的基准测试，定义了三个操作机制：多通道组合在部分任务中提升性能（AUROC分别达到0.944和0.955），但并非总是优于单通道基线；协调主要改善可解释性和可追溯性。
AI.motivation: 科学证据通常跨越仪器、数据库和学科，没有任何单一来源能记录完整现象，因此难以确定协调的AI智能体何时比更简单的科学工作流程更有价值。
AI.method: 构建了一个跨越四个科学任务的跨领域基准测试：分子结构音乐化映射、科学历史范式转变检测、虫媒疾病 emergence识别、凌日系外行星候选体验证。每个案例使用冻结的评估面板、预定义的评分协议、显式基线、消融或null对照以及明确的局限性。
AI.result: 确定了三个操作机制：1)当不同学科各自仅捕获部分现象时，跨通道组合改善单一通道基线—气候-虫媒 emergence达AUROC 0.944，系外行星筛选达AUROC 0.955；2)系外行星工作流程与强组合摘要基线基本持平，显示分解不一定改善顶级性能；3)当一个信号主导时（如范式转变检测），协调主要改善解释和可追溯性；分子音乐化的收益是表征性的而非预测性的。
AI.conclusion: 只有当相应的性能、可追溯性或表征声明得到显式比较器的支持时，基准才对协调赋值。协调AI智能体的价值不是固有的，而是需要在具体任务中通过明确的性能对比来证明。

relevance_reason: 完全无关论文。该论文主题是关于跨领域协调AI智能体在科学推理中的应用（分子结构音乐化、范式转变检测、疾病emergence发现、系外行星筛选），属于AI for Science领域，与计算机图形学毫无关系。论文完全不涉及：1) 2D视频到3D运动提取/生成；2) 人体姿态估计；3) 扩散模型在视频/运动生成中的应用；4) VLM在视觉质量评估中的应用；5) 视频生成先验。该论文使用的"方法"（如协调AI智能体）也与研究profile中的任何方法完全不同。这是一篇完全错误的论文，与research profile的Application Domain mismatch。

title: Who Uses AI? Platforms, Workforce, and AI Exposure
summary: A growing literature uses artificial intelligence platform conversation logs to measure occupation exposure. We show that these scores partly measure platform user base rather than the workforce. Holding outcome, sample, controls, and estimator fixed while varying only the platform input changes the post-ChatGPT employment coefficient by a factor of 1.9, and within-vendor consumer-versus-enterprise channels produce estimates that disagree in sign. Reweighting to Bureau of Labor Statistics workforce shares attenuates estimates by 42 to 93 percent. We formalize the non-classical measurement error, derive probability limits and partial-identification bounds for employment elasticities. The bias understates substitution more than augmentation.

AI.tldr: 一篇关于使用AI平台对话日志测量职业暴露的论文，指出这种方法的非经典测量误差问题，并进行形式化分析和边界推导。
AI.motivation: 学界日益使用人工智能平台的对话日志来衡量职业暴露，但作者怀疑这些分数实际上测量的是平台用户基础而非真实劳动力市场情况。
AI.method: 固定结果、样本、控制和估计量，仅改变平台输入来观察系数变化；比较供应商的消费者与企业渠道；使用劳工统计局劳动力份额重新加权进行验证。
AI.result: 仅改变平台输入可使ChatGPT就业系数变化1.9倍；消费者与企业渠道的估计值符号相反；重新加权使估计值降低42%至93%。
AI.conclusion: 存在非经典测量误差，对替代的低估超过对增强的低估；需要推导概率极限和就业弹性的部分识别边界。

relevance_reason: 该论文属于劳动经济学/经济学领域，研究如何通过AI平台对话日志衡量职业暴露度，与计算机图形学完全无关。它既不涉及任何计算机图形方法（扩散模型、VLM、视频生成先验、三维运动生成、姿态估计、时间建模），也不处理任何相关应用场景（二维视频到三维运动恢复、质量评估、特征对齐、自然性/物理真实性保证）。论文主题是关于测量方法误差的经济学分析，应用领域完全不同。

title: Improving 3D Labeling in Self-Driving by Inferring Vehicle Information using Vision Language Models
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), 2026. Accepted for oral presentation
summary: We present an approach to improve 3D vehicle labeling in self-driving applications through zero-shot inference of vehicle information, leveraging Vehicle Make and Model Recognition (VMMR) methods. The proposed approach utilizes a Vision Language Model (VLM) to both infer a vehicle's make, model, and generation from image crops, and output accurate 3D bounding box dimensions to seed manual labeling. We evaluate the impact of iterative prompt engineering and the choice of different VLMs on both vehicle bounding box inference and make/model/generation recognition. When compared to strong baselines, the proposed approach not only shows high accuracy, but also excels in mitigating specific failure modes where VLMs provide better dimensions than initial lidar-aided human annotated labels (e.g., in cases of significant vehicle occlusion). Experiments on both public and proprietary data strongly suggest that our conclusions are generalizable across different labelers and datasets. The results demonstrate that integrating VLMs into the labeling process can reduce manual labeling time while increasing label quality.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用视觉语言模型(VLM)和车辆品牌型号识别(VMMR)方法来改进自动驾驶场景中3D车辆标注的方法，通过零样本推理来推断车辆的品牌、型号和代际信息，并输出准确的3D边界框尺寸。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D车辆标注方法依赖激光雷达辅助人工标注，但在车辆严重遮挡情况下容易产生不准确的边界框，且人工标注效率较低。需要一种方法来提高标注质量和效率。
AI.method: 使用视觉语言模型从图像裁剪中推断车辆的、品牌、型号和代际信息，并输出3D边界框尺寸用于种子标注。评估了迭代提示工程和不同VLM选择对车辆边界框推理和品牌/型号/代际识别的影响。
AI.result: 相比强基线方法，该方法不仅显示高准确性，还能缓解特定失败模式（如在车辆严重遮挡情况下，VLM提供的边界框尺寸优于初始激光雷达辅助人工标注）。实验表明该结论可跨不同标注员和数据集推广。
AI.conclusion: 将VLM集成到标注流程中可以减少人工标注时间同时提高标签质量，具有在实际应用中推广的潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about self-driving vehicle detection and 3D bounding box annotation, which is completely different from the Computer Graphics field of 3D motion generation from video. Although both involve VLM and 3D understanding, they are in entirely different application domains - autonomous driving perception vs. human/computer motion generation. The research profile focuses on extracting and generating 3D motion from video (video-to-motion), while this paper focuses on vehicle identification and labeling for autonomous vehicles.

title: LCGuard: Latent Communication Guard for Safe KV Sharing in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems increasingly rely on intermediate communication to coordinate complex tasks. While most existing systems communicate through natural language, recent work shows that latent communication, particularly through transformer key-value (KV) caches, can improve efficiency and preserve richer task-relevant information. However, KV caches also encode contextual inputs, intermediate reasoning states, and agent-specific information, creating an opaque channel through which sensitive content may propagate across agents without explicit textual disclosure. To address this, we introduce \textbf{LCGuard} (Latent Communication Guard), a framework for safe KV-based latent communication in multi-agent LLM systems. LCGuard treats shared KV caches as latent working memory and learns representation-level transformations before cache artifacts are transmitted across agents. We formalize representation-level sensitive information leakage operationally through reconstruction: a shared cache artifact is unsafe if an adversarial decoder can recover agent-specific sensitive inputs from it. This leads to an adversarial training formulation in which the adversary learns to reconstruct sensitive inputs, while LCGuard learns transformations that preserve task-relevant semantics and reduce reconstructable information. Empirical evaluations across multiple model families and multi-agent benchmarks show that LCGuard consistently reduces reconstruction-based leakage and attack success rates while maintaining competitive task performance compared to standard KV-sharing baselines.

AI.tldr: LCGuard是一个用于多智能体LLM系统中安全KV潜在通信的框架，通过学习表示级变换来防止敏感信息通过KV缓存泄漏。实验表明该方法能有效降低重建泄漏和攻击成功率，同时保持竞争性的任务性能。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统需要通过中间通信协调复杂任务。近期研究表明，通过transformer键值(KV)缓存的潜在通信比自然语言更高效且能保留更丰富的任务相关信息。但KV缓存编码了上下文输入、中间推理状态和智能体特定信息，形成了一个不透明的通道，敏感内容可能在没有明确文本披露的情况下在智能体间传播，造成潜在的安全风险。
AI.method: 将共享KV缓存作为潜在工作内存，在缓存伪影传输到其他智能体之前学习表示级变换。通过重建操作化定义敏感信息泄漏：如果对抗性解码器能从共享缓存伪影中恢复智能体特定的敏感输入，则该缓存不安全。采用对抗训练形式：对手学习重建敏感输入，而LCGuard学习保留任务相关语义同时减少可重建信息的变换。
AI.result: 在多个模型家族和多智能体基准测试上的实证评估表明，LCGuard一致性地降低了基于重建的泄漏和攻击成功率，同时与标准KV共享基线相比保持了具有竞争力的任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功提出了LCGuard框架，通过表示级变换有效保护多智能体LLM系统中潜在通信通道的敏感信息，在减少信息泄漏的同时维持了任务性能，为安全的多智能体系统通信提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI security and multi-agent LLM systems (preventing KV cache information leakage), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. The application domain is completely unrelated - it deals with LLM safety/privacy rather than video-to-motion extraction, pose estimation, or any graphics/motion tasks. No overlap in methods or application area.

title: A Causal Argumentation Method for Explainability of Machine Learning Models
comment: To be published in The 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) methods identify which features are relevant to a model's predictions but often fail to clarify why certain decisions are made. In this work, we present a novel method that integrates causality with argument-based reasoning to explain why models may be making predictions. Our approach first identifies causal relationships among variables using causal discovery methods and then translates these into a Bipolar Argumentation Framework (BAF) to represent supportive and opposing interactions among features. By using semi-stable semantics, we find extensions of features that explain why certain outcomes may have been chosen. We demonstrate our method on two benchmark datasets and compare its results against standard post-hoc explainability approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合因果关系与论证框架的可解释AI方法，通过将因果发现结果转换为 Bipolar Argumentation Framework (BAF)，利用半稳定语义识别支持性和反对性特征交互，从而解释模型为何做出特定预测。
AI.motivation: 当前可解释人工智能(XAI)方法虽然能够识别与模型预测相关的特征，但无法阐明模型做出某些决策的具体原因，存在"知其然而不知其所以然"的局限性。
AI.method: 首先使用因果发现方法识别变量间的因果关系，然后将这些因果关系转换为 Bipolar Argumentation Framework (BAF) 来表示特征之间的支持与反对交互，最后通过半稳定语义(semi-stable semantics)找到特征扩展集，用于解释为何某些结果会被选择。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上验证了该方法，并与标准后验可解释性方法进行了对比。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合因果推理与论证-based reasoning，能够更深入地解释模型的决策过程，不仅说明哪些特征相关，还揭示了特征之间的因果机制和交互关系。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Explainable AI (XAI) using causal reasoning and argumentation frameworks - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. It addresses model interpretability rather than any computer graphics task such as 3D motion extraction from videos, video generation, pose estimation, or motion generation. There is no application domain match, no method overlap (diffusion models, VLM, pose estimation, temporal modeling), and does not address any of the specified pain points related to video-to-3D motion extraction, quality assessment, feature alignment, or motion naturalness.

title: BodyReLux: Temporally Consistent Full-Body Video Relighting
comment: Siggraph 2026 Journal Track. Project page: https://eyeline-labs.github.io/bodyrelux/
summary: Being able to relight human performance is a fundamental task for post production and content creation. We present BodyReLux, a subject-specific video diffusion-based framework for relighting full-body human performances in a temporally consistent way. Our model is trained on a hybrid dataset of pixel-aligned video relighting pairs, covering a diverse combination of lighting conditions, performances and viewpoints. To acquire such dataset, we combine traditional static One-Light-at-a-Time (OLAT) capture and a novel dynamic performance capture in which two smoothly varying lighting sequences are rapidly interleaved. Because the lighting operates above the human flicker-fusion threshold, the interleaving does not appear to strobe. We train our video relighting model from a pretrained text-to-video model to fully leverage the generative priors for producing high quality videos. To achieve accurate lighting control, we introduce a new lighting conditioning method that represents each light source as a token. We further condition on sequences of lighting using masked attention to support dynamic lighting control. Together with a carefully designed data augmentation pipeline, we achieve photorealistic, robust, and temporally consistent video relighting of subject-specific human performances.
