title: What Counts as AI Sycophancy? A Taxonomy and Expert Survey of a Fragmented Construct
summary: AI sycophancy has become a prominent concern in large language model (LLM) research. Yet the term lacks a consistent definition and has been applied to behaviors ranging from agreeing with a user's false claim to excessively praising the user to withholding corrective feedback. When researchers, companies, and policymakers use the same term to describe different behaviors, evaluation results become difficult to compare, mitigation strategies fail to transfer, and systems that are resistant to one form of sycophancy continue exhibiting other forms. To address this, we make two contributions. First, we reviewed 70 papers on AI sycophancy to develop a taxonomy of how the behavior has been defined and measured. The taxonomy distinguishes (1) whether a model is sycophantic toward a user's positions and beliefs, or toward the user's broader personal traits and emotions, and (2) whether this occurs through explicit, direct language or more implicit, subtle behaviors such as framing, omission, or tone. Mapping existing literature to our taxonomy reveals that current research has focused on overt forms of sycophancy toward users' beliefs, leaving more subtle and person-directed behaviors relatively understudied. Second, we surveyed 106 experts in AI sycophancy and related fields to examine whether researchers agree on which model behaviors are sycophantic. While experts are nearly unanimous in believing that sycophancy is a significant problem in current AI systems (94.3% agree), they disagree substantially on which specific behaviors qualify. Together, these findings demonstrate that AI sycophancy is a broad family of behaviors with different measurement challenges, intervention requirements, and governance implications. Our taxonomy provides a shared vocabulary for understanding and addressing these behaviors.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文解决AI谄媚（sycophancy）缺乏一致定义的问题。研究回顾了70篇相关论文并调查了106位专家，以创建一个分类法来统一理解和测量AI系统中的谄媚行为。
AI.motivation: AI谄媚已成为大型语言模型研究中的重要关切，但该术语缺乏一致的定义，被用于描述从同意用户的错误声明到过度赞美用户再到隐瞒纠正性反馈等多种行为。这导致评估结果难以比较， Mitigation策略无法转移，对一种形式谄媚免疫的系统继续表现出其他形式。
AI.method: 首先，回顾了70篇关于AI谄媚的论文，以开发一个分类法来界定和衡量这种行为。该分类法区分了（1）模型是针对用户的态度和信念还是针对用户更广泛的人格特质和情感表现出谄媚，（2）这是通过明确的直接语言还是通过更隐含的微妙行为如框架、省略或语气。其次，调查了106位AI谄泌及相关领域的专家，以检查研究人员对哪些模型行为属于谄媚意见是否一致。
AI.result: 将现有文献映射到分类法揭示，当前研究集中于针对用户信念的公开形式的谄媚，而更微妙和针对人的行为相对未被充分研究。尽管专家们几乎一致认为谄媚是当前AI系统中的一个重要问题（94.3%同意），但他们对哪些具体行为符合条件存在重大分歧。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现表明，AI谄媚是一系列具有不同测量挑战、干预要求和治理影响的行为。我们的分类法为理解和解决这些行为提供了共享词汇。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI sycophancy and LLM alignment - completely different domain (AI safety/ethics). It has NO relation to Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. None of the methods mentioned (diffusion for motion, VLM for quality assessment, pose estimation, video generation priors) are addressed. This paper only deals with large language model behavior taxonomy via surveys.

title: SceneGraphGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding via Structured Scene Graph Matching
summary: Zero-shot 3D visual grounding requires localizing objects in unstructured environments from free-form natural language. Recent vision-language model (VLM) approaches achieve promising results but rely on view-dependent reasoning or implicit representations, limiting spatial consistency and interpretability for compositional queries. We propose SceneGraphGrounder, a framework that reformulates 3D grounding as structured graph matching over a reconstructed 3D scene graph. To enable this formulation, we introduce a visual marker prompting strategy that enables a VLM to infer object-object relationships from 2D views, which are subsequently lifted into a persistent 3D scene graph encoding both spatial and semantic relations. Given a query, we construct a query graph and perform constrained alignment with the scene graph, ensuring multi-view consistency and interpretable reasoning. Experiments on the ScanRefer benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance among zero-shot approaches, using only RGB-D inputs. We further validate our framework through real-world deployment on a mobile robot, demonstrating robust spatial reasoning in long-horizon physical environments. We will make our code publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出SceneGraphGrounder框架，将零样本3D视觉定位任务重新表述为结构化图匹配问题，通过视觉标记提示策略让VLM从2D视图推断对象关系并构建3D场景图，实现多视图一致性和可解释性推理。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本3D视觉定位方法存在局限性：依赖视图依赖推理或隐式表示，限制了空间一致性以及对组合查询的可解释性。
AI.method: 第一，设计视觉标记提示策略，使VLM能够从2D视图推断对象-对象关系，并将这些关系提升为持久的3D场景图，同时编码空间和语义关系。第二，给定自然语言查询后，构建查询图并与场景图执行约束对齐，确保多视图一致性和可解释性推理。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer基准上实现有竞争力的零样本性能，仅使用RGB-D输入；并在移动机器人上部署验证，证明该框架能在真实长期物理环境中实现稳健的空间推理。
AI.conclusion: SceneGraphGrounded能够以结构化方式实现零样本3D视觉定位，保证了可解释性和空间一致性，为机器人导航等实际应用提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D visual grounding for robotics (spatial reasoning with object relationships), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics (3D motion generation from 2D videos). The pain points and methods are misaligned: the profile targets motion extraction/generation with diffusion models and temporal modeling, while this paper focuses on scene graph matching using VLM for multi-view consistency in robotics. No overlap in application domain - this is about robot navigation, not human motion or action generation.

title: MM-Conv: A Multimodal Dataset and Benchmark for Context-Aware Grounding in 3D Dialogue
comment: Extended version of the paper published at LREC 2026 (Palma de Mallorca, Spain), with expanded VLM baselines and inter-annotator agreement analysis
summary: Grounding language in the physical world requires AI systems to interpret references that emerge dynamically during conversation. While current vision-language models (VLMs) excel at static image tasks, they struggle to resolve ambiguous expressions in spontaneous, multi-turn dialogue. We address this gap by introducing (1) a benchmark for referential communication in dynamic 3D environments, built from 6.7 hours of egocentric VR interaction with synchronized speech, motion, gaze, and 3D scene geometry, and (2) a two-stage grounding pipeline that explicitly resolves conversational ambiguity before visual localization. The benchmark includes over 4,200 manually verified referring expressions spanning full, partitive, and pronominal types. Our contextual rewriting approach improves grounding performance by 11-22 percentage points on average, with a pure detector (GroundingDINO) reaching 56.7% on pronominals after rewriting, nearly double the best end-to-end baseline. Results demonstrate that decoupling linguistic reasoning from visual perception is more effective than end-to-end approaches for conversational grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个贡献：一是构建了一个基于VR交互的动态3D环境指代communication基准数据集，包含6.7小时的第一人称VR交互数据、同步的语音、眼球注视和3D场景几何信息，以及4200多个经过人工验证的指代表达式；二是提出了一个两阶段的着陆管道，通过显式解析对话歧义后再进行视觉定位。实验表明，上下文重写方法将接地性能提高了11-22个百分点，纯检测器在代词上的准确率达到56.7%，接近端到端最佳基线的两倍。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型虽然在静态图像任务上表现出色，但在解决自发多轮对话中的模糊表达方面存在困难。现实世界的语言基础需要在动态对话中实时解释不断出现的引用，而现有模型缺乏这种能力。因此需要构建新的基准和方法来推动这一领域的研究。
AI.method: 1) 构建了一个包含6.7小时第一人称VR交互的基准数据集，同步采集了语音、运动、眼球注视和3D场景几何信息，包含4200多个经过人工验证的指代表达式，涵盖完整、部分和代词三种类型；2) 提出两阶段着陆管道，首先进行上下文重写消解对话歧义，然后进行视觉定位。
AI.result: 上下文重写方法将基础接地性能平均提高11-22个百分点。使用GroundingDINO的纯检测器在经过重写后，对代词的准确率达到56.7%，接近端到端最佳基线的两倍。
AI.conclusion: 将语言推理与视觉感知解耦的方法比端到端方法更适合对话基础任务。这一研究为动态3D环境中的指代communication提供了新的基准和方法，证明了显式歧义解决的有效性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about visual language grounding in 3D dialogue and VR interactions, focusing on resolving ambiguous references through context rewriting and visual detection. While it uses VLMs, it addresses a completely different application domain than the research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation/extraction from 2D videos. The pain points are also different - this paper deals with dialogue ambiguity and referential expressions, not motion extraction, quality assessment, or physical realism. The methods mentioned (pose estimation, temporal modeling, diffusion for motion) are not present here.

title: Implicit Safety Alignment from Crowd Preferences
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) can reveal implicit objectives such as safety considerations that go beyond task completion. In this work, we focus on the common safety criteria embedded in crowd preference datasets, where different users may express distinct preferences or objectives, yet follow similar safety principles. Our aim is to discover shared safety criteria from crowd preferences and then transfer them to downstream RL tasks to regularize agent behavior and enforce safety. We first show that direct reward combination-optimizing a preference-learned reward model together with downstream task rewards-has inherent limitations. Motivated by this, we propose Safe Crowd Preference-based RL, a hierarchical framework that extracts safety-aligned skills from crowd preferences and composes them via a high-level policy to safely solve downstream tasks. Experiments across safe RL environments and a preliminary LLM-style task with diverse user goals and shared safety constraints demonstrate that our approach substantially lowers safety costs without access to explicit safety rewards, while achieving task performance comparable to oracle methods trained with ground-truth safety signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Safe Crowd Preference-based RL方法，从众包偏好数据中提取共享的安全标准，并将其迁移到下游强化学习任务中，以规范智能体行为并强制执行安全约束。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解决两个问题：1）直接从群体偏好中学习隐含的安全目标；2）将发现的安全标准转移到下游任务。直接组合奖励优化存在局限性，需要一种分层框架来提取安全对齐的技能。
AI.method: 1）首先展示直接奖励组合（优化偏好学习的奖励模型与下游任务奖励）的固有局限性；2）提出 Safe Crowd Preference-based RL，分层框架从众包偏好中提取安全对齐的技能，并通过高级策略组合以安全地解决下游任务。
AI.result: 在安全RL环境和LLM风格任务的实验表明，与使用显式安全奖励的oracle方法相比，该方法显著降低了安全成本，同时实现相当的任务性能。
AI.conclusion: Safe Crowd Preference-based RL能够有效地从众包偏好中提取隐含的安全标准，无需访问显式的安全奖励即可降低安全成本，为如何在没有明确监督的情况下从人群偏好中学习安全行为提供了有价值的见解。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于强化学习安全对齐的研究，涉及从众包偏好中提取安全标准并应用于RL任务。这与计算机图形学领域的2D视频3D运动提取完全无关。该论文既不在正确的应用领域(Computer Graphics/Motion Generation)，也不涉及所需的方法(Pose Estimation、Diffusion Models用于动作生成、Video Priors)。研究痛点也完全不匹配-该论文不处理视频噪声、运动自然性或特征对齐问题。这是一个AI安全和RL领域的不相关论文。

title: Seizure-Semiology-Suite (S3): A Clinically Multimodal Dataset, Benchmark, and Models for Seizure Semiology Understanding
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 as a Spotlight presentation
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable proficiency in general video understanding, their capacity to interpret involuntary, and spatio-temporally evolving pathologic motor behaviors such as seizure semiology remains largely untested. To address this gap, we introduce Seizure-Semiology-Suite, a clinically grounded dataset and benchmark for fine-grained, structured seizure semiology understanding. The dataset includes 438 seizure videos annotated with over 35,000 dense labels covering 20 ILAE-defined semiological features. Building on this dataset, we propose a seven-task hierarchical benchmark that systematically evaluates MLLMs from low-level visual perception to temporal sequencing, narrative report generation, and seizure diagnosis. To enable clinically meaningful evaluation of generated reports, we further introduce the Report Quality Index for Seizure Semiology (Seizure-RQI). Extensive baselines across 11 open-weight MLLMs reveal systematic weaknesses in laterality reasoning, temporal localization, symptom sequencing, and clinically faithful reporting. We show that seizure-specific fine-tuning substantially improves performance across tasks, and that a two-stage neuro-symbolic framework achieves an F1 score of 0.96 on epileptic versus non-epileptic seizure classification. Seizure-Semiology-Suite establishes a rigorous benchmark for evaluating multimodal models in safety-critical medical video understanding and guides the development of clinically reliable, domain-adaptive multimodal intelligence.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了Seizure-Semiology-Suite，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在癫痫发作症状学理解方面能力的临床数据集和基准测试。该数据集包含438个癫痫发作视频，标注超过35,000个密集标签，涵盖20个ILAE定义的半症状学特征，并设计了七任务层次化基准测试来系统评估模型的视觉感知、时间排序、报告生成和诊断能力。
AI.motivation: 虽然多模态大语言模型在一般视频理解方面表现优异，但它们解释非自愿的、时空演变的病理运动行为（如癫痫发作症状学/seizure semiology）的能力尚未被测试。这是一个重要的研究空白，因为准确的癫痫发作症状学理解对临床诊断至关重要。
AI.method: 1) 构建了包含438个癫痫发作视频的Seizure-Semiology-Suite数据集，标注超过35,000个密集标签，覆盖20个ILAE定义的半症状学特征；2) 提出七任务层次化基准测试，从低层视觉感知到时间排序、叙事报告生成和癫痫诊断进行系统评估；3) 引入Seizure-RQI（报告质量指数）用于临床报告评估；4) 在11个开放权重MLLMs上进行基线测试；5) 探索癫痫特定微调和双阶段神经符号框架。
AI.result: 基线测试揭示了MLLMs在左右侧推理、时间定位、症状排序和临床 faithful报告方面存在系统性弱点。癫痫特定微调显著提升了各项任务的性能，双阶段神经符号框架在癫痫性vs非癫痫性发作分类上达到了0.96的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: Seizure-Semiology-Suite为评估安全关键的医学视频理解多模态模型建立了严格基准，并指导了临床可靠的领域自适应多模态智能的发展。研究表明针对医学领域的专门训练和数据对于提升AI辅助临床诊断的准确性和可靠性至关重要。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的应用领域。该论文是关于癫痫发作的临床医学理解和诊断，属于医疗AI/临床AI领域。而研究Profile是计算机图形学，具体是关于从2D视频提取3D运动、视频生成先验、动作生成等。虽然该论文可能使用了VLM和多模态模型，但应用领域完全不同(医学癫痫诊断 vs 计算机图形学动作生成)。这相当于"diffusion for image generation" vs "diffusion for human motion generation"的区别——应用领域不同导致完全不相关。

title: CrossVLA: Cross-Paradigm Post-Training and Inference Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: Workshop draft, 14 pages, 4 figures. Code, ckpts, data: https://github.com/lz-googlefycy/vla-lab
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have rapidly converged on a small set of architectural patterns: discrete-token autoregression (e.g. OpenVLA) and continuous-action flow-matching (e.g. pi-0.5). Yet preference alignment via Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) -- the de-facto post-training step in language models -- has been studied almost exclusively on autoregressive VLAs. We present CrossVLA, an empirical study of cross-paradigm VLA post-training. Three contributions: (i) a surrogate flow-matching log-probability estimator that lets DPO operate on continuous-action backbones without probability-flow ODE integration; (ii) a head-to-head comparison of LoRA and DoRA as the parameter-efficient layer for VLA DPO, finding DoRA improves over OpenVLA SFT by a mean +10.4 pp across LIBERO 4-suite (600 trials, 3 seeds) -- per-suite +20.0 Object, +11.0 Long-horizon, +8.0 Goal, +2.7 Spatial -- with zero seed variance on Object (38/50 on each of 3 seeds); (iii) an inference-time anatomy showing the denoise loop dominates 78.6% of sample_actions latency and prefix-K/V caching a la VLA-Cache caps at a 21% acceleration ceiling -- both chunk-level and token-level cache strategies degrade success rate to 0-80% in our benchmarks. We further pretrain a multi-view + temporal projection head on 6000 LIBERO frames, achieving 99.5% k-NN recall@1 for same-task retrieval (36x over random), available as a downstream initialisation. All code, ckpts, training logs, and reproduction scripts are open at https://github.com/lz-googlefycy/vla-lab.

AI.tldr: CrossVLA研究了在VLA模型上进行跨架构范式的偏好对齐后训练，提出流匹配对数概率估计器使DPO适用于连续动作模型，对比LoRA/DoRA微调方法，发现DoRA在LIBERO任务上显著优于基线，并分析了推理延迟构成和缓存加速上限
AI.motivation: 研究视觉语言动作(VLA)模型在机器人领域的后训练方法，特别是将偏好对齐技术DPO应用于不同架构范式（离散token自回归 vs 连续动作流匹配）的跨 Paradigm 对比研究
AI.method: 提出流匹配的对数概率估计器使DPO能在连续动作骨干网上运行；对比LoRA和DoRA作为VLA DPO的参数高效微调层；在推理时分析延迟构成并测试缓存策略；预训练多视角时间投影头用于任务检索
AI.result: DoRA相比OpenVLA SFT在LIBERO 4-suite上提升平均+10.4个百分点，分项为Object +20.0、Long-horizon +11.0、Goal +8.0、Spatial +2.7；推断时去噪循环占总延迟78.6%，prefix-K/V缓存加速上限21%，缓存策略使成功率降至0-80%；多视角投影头达到99.5%的k-NN召回率
AI.conclusion: 首次系统性研究跨范式VLA后训练，证明DoRA优于LoRA且流匹配架构可成功应用DPO；揭示推断优化方向，去噪循环是主要瓶颈，缓存策略需谨慎使用

relevance_reason: Application domain完全错误。研究Profile是Computer Graphics中的「从2D视频提取恢复三维运动信息」(如人体动作生成)，而论文是Robotics领域的VLA机器人控制。两者虽然都涉及VLA/VLM，但应用目的截然不同：一个是让机器人执行操作任务，另一个是从视频生成自然人体运动。虽然提到VLM是Profile中的方法之一，但该论文重点不在质量评估，而在机器人后训练和参数微调。这种跨领域差异应该得低分。

title: FLUID: From Ephemeral IDs to Multimodal Semantic Codes for Industrial-Scale Livestreaming Recommendation
summary: Modern recommender systems rely heavily on ID-based collaborative filtering: each item is represented by a unique ID embedding that accumulates collaborative signals from user interactions. Livestreaming recommendation, however, faces a unique challenge in this paradigm: a live room typically broadcasts for only tens of minutes, so its item ID remains poorly learned in a persistent cold-start state and ID-centric ranking models fail to generalize. We present FLUID, the first framework to fully retire the candidate-side item ID from a production-scale livestreaming ranker. FLUID couples a cross-domain multimodal encoder, jointly trained on short videos and livestreams to produce discrete hierarchical codes (LUCID), with a late-fusion, ID-free design that injects slice-level and room-level LUCID as independent tokens, stabilized by a staged warmup under online incremental training. Deployed on our industrial livestreaming recommenders with a cross-platform combined user base of over one billion globally, FLUID delivers significant online gains of +0.55% Quality Watch Duration, +2.05% Cold-Start Room Views, and +0.05% Active Hours.

AI.tldr: FLOOD框架通过跨域多模态编码器生成离线层次编码（LUCID），结合延迟融合的IDfree设计替代传统ID嵌入方法，解决了直播推荐中item ID冷启动的核心难题，在超过10亿用户的工业系统中验证有效
AI.motivation: 直播推荐的独特挑战在于直播间播出时长通常只有几十分钟，导致item ID长期处于冷启动状态无法积累足够的协作信号，传统的ID协同过滤方法在此场景下失效
AI.method: 提出三项核心技术：1) 跨域多模态编码器，联合训练短视频和直播生成离散层次代码(LUCID)；2) 延迟融合的ID-free设计，将slice级和room级LUCID作为独立token注入模型；3) 分阶段预热机制配合在线增量训练实现平稳过渡
AI.result: 部署于全球超10亿用户的工业直播推荐系统后，质量观看时长提升+0.55%，冷启动房间曝光提升+2.05%，活跃时长提升+0.05%
AI.conclusion: FLUID是首个在生产级直播推荐系统中完全放弃候选端item ID的框架，通过跨域多模态编码器生成离散层次代码(LUCID)，结合延迟融合设计，在线增量训练下渐进式上线，最终实现了显著的业务指标提升

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文是关于直播推荐系统的研究，聚焦于解决直播间的item ID冷启动问题，使用的是推荐系统常用的ID嵌入和多模态编码技术。而研究档案关注的是计算机图形学领域的3D人体动作生成，需要从2D视频中提取姿态信息、使用扩散模型生成自然动作等。两者在应用领域上完全不同——推荐系统 vs 计算机图形学/动作生成，且方法也不对应（推荐算法 vs 动作生成模型）。

title: Planning in the LLM Era: Building for Reliability and Efficiency
summary: Growing attention to intelligent agents has put a spotlight on one of their central capabilities: planning. Early attempts to leverage large language models (LLMs) for planning relied on single-shot plan generation, followed by hybrid approaches that coupled LLMs with limited external search. These methods, unsound and incomplete by their very nature, often require substantial resources without yielding better solutions on unseen problems. As the limitations of LLMs become clearer, recent work has shifted toward using them at solution construction time -- generating symbolic solvers for a family of problems that can be verified and then used efficiently at inference time. This trend reflects the growing need for agents that are both reliable and resource-efficient. It also offers a path towards generating maintainable planners with minimal dependence on language models at inference time. In this paper, we argue that this shift reflects a broader realignment of the planning field in the LLM era. We examine three major categories of planner-generation methods, discuss their current limitations, and outline research steps towards a more reliable and efficient LLM-based generation of planners.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）时代下智能体规划方法的范式转变，从早期单次生成和混合搜索方法，转向在解决方案构建时生成符号求解器，以实现更可靠、资源效率更高的规划器。
AI.motivation: 早期利用LLM进行规划的尝试存在根本性缺陷：单次生成和混合外部搜索方法本质上不健全、不完整，往往需要大量资源却无法在未见问题上产生更好的解决方案。同时，LLM的局限性日益明显，需要探索新的路径来生成可维护的规划器。
AI.method: 本文检验了三类主要的规划器生成方法，分析了它们的现有局限，并提出了研究步骤以实现更可靠和高效的基于LLM的规划器生成。
AI.result: 本文勾勒出了实现更可靠、高效的LLM规划器生成的研究方向，强调了最小化推理时对语言模型的依赖，以及生成可维护规划器的路径。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为，这一转变反映了LLM时代规划领域的更广泛范式重整，既要求智能体具有可靠性，又要求资源效率，为下一代智能体规划系统的设计提供了重要指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based planning agents (AI planning/symbolic solvers), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has nothing to do with 2D video-to-3D motion extraction, diffusion models for motion generation, pose estimation, video generation priors, or any of the specified methods. The field (AI/ML planning) and application domain are entirely different from the research profile's focus on computer graphics and 3D motion generation.

title: Two-Stage Multimodal Framework for Emotion Mimicry Intensity Prediction
comment: 10th Affective & Behavior Analysis in-the-wild, CVPR Workshop 2026
summary: We present our submission to the Hume-ABAW10 Emotional Mimicry Intensity (EMI) Challenge, which aims to predict six continuous emotion intensity dimensions: Admiration, Amusement, Determination, Empathic Pain, Excitement, and Joy, from in-the-wild multimodal video clips. We propose a staged multimodal framework that combines textual, acoustic, and visual representations, with an optional motion branch. Our approach first trains modality-specific encoders independently and then fuses their learned representations through a lightweight regressor with modality dropout and controlled encoder adaptation. Across our submitted systems, the best validation performance is obtained by the text--audio--vision--motion fusion model under the expanded 4:1 split, achieving an average Pearson correlation of 0.4722. Although the motion branch yields only very slight gains, its behavior can be interesting to study. Our team was placed third in the EMI challenge, achieving an average Pearson correlation of 0.57 for the test set. Overall, we provide a practical and reproducible baseline for EMI prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Hume-ABAW10情感模仿强度(EMI)挑战的多模态预测框架，能够同时预测六个连续情绪强度维度（钦佩、趣味、决心、共情疼痛、兴奋和喜悦）。方法采用分阶段多模态框架，结合文本、声学和视觉表示及可选的运动分支，通过独立训练的模态特定编码器和轻量级回归器进行特征融合。最佳模型在扩展4:1划分下达到了0.4722的平均皮尔逊相关系数，最终在测试集上获得0.57的平均皮尔逊相关系数，排名第三。
AI.motivation: 情感模仿强度(EMI)预测是理解人类社交互动中的重要课题，现有方法通常难以有效整合多模态信息，且缺乏针对六个连续情绪强度维度预测的综合解决方案。
AI.method: 提出分阶段多模态框架，首先独立训练文本、声学和视觉模态的编码器，然后通过轻量级回归器融合学习到的表示，并采用模态Dropout和受控编码器自适应技术。可选地添加运动分支以增强时序信息建模。
AI.result: 在扩展4:1数据集划分下，文本-音频-视觉-运动融合模型获得最佳验证性能，平均皮尔逊相关系数为0.4722；最终在测试集上达到0.57的平均皮尔逊相关系数，位列第三。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为EMI预测提供了实用且可复现的基线方案，证明多模态融合方法在情感强度预测任务中具有有效性，但运动分支提升有限，值得进一步深入研究其特性。

relevance_reason: 该论文属于情感计算/情感识别领域(Affective Computing)，主要研究多模态情感强度预测，与计算机图形学中的人体动作生成任务完全不同。虽然论文提到了"运动分支"，但它只是用于捕捉面部表情变化和身体姿态特征，并非计算机图形学中从2D视频恢复和生成三维人体运动。即使都涉及视觉和多模态模态，两者的应用领域、研究目标和核心技术都不相关：一个是情感识别，另一个是3D动作生成。因此，该论文与研究档案完全不匹配。

title: Universal CT Representations from Anatomy to Disease Phenotype through Agglomerative Pretraining
summary: Computed tomography (CT) is a central to three-dimensional medical imaging, yet CT-based artificial intelligence remains fragmented across task-specific models for segmentation, classification, registration, and report analysis. Here we present FlexiCT, a family of CT foundation models trained by agglomerative continual pretraining on 266,227 CT volumes from 56 publicly available datasets, forming a large-scale public resource for CT representation learning. FlexiCT uses agglomerative pretraining across three stages: two-dimensional axial pretraining, three-dimensional anatomical pretraining and report-guided semantic alignment. This training strategy supports slice-level, volume-level and vision-language analysis. Across five downstream task families (segmentation, classification, registration, vision-language understanding and clinical retrieval), FlexiCT matches or exceeds prior task-specific approaches on multiple benchmarks. Its embeddings further organize CT scans along gradients associated with various tumor stages, suggesting that CT foundation models can capture imaging features relevant to disease phenotype characterization. Code is available at https://github.com/ricklisz/FlexiCT

AI.tldr: FlexiCT是一个CT基础模型家族，通过在266,227个CT体积上的三阶段聚集式持续预训练，实现了切片级、体积级和视觉语言分析的支持，可应用于分割、分类、配准、视觉语言理解和临床检索等多个下游任务。
AI.motivation: 当前CT人工智能模型分散在不同任务中（分割、分类、配准、报告分析），缺乏统一的基础模型，需要建立一个大规模的CT表示学习资源。
AI.method: 采用三阶段聚集式预训练：1) 二维轴向预训练；2) 三维解剖学预训练；3) 报告引导的语义对齐。使用56个公开数据集的266,227个CT体积进行训练。
AI.result: 在五个下游任务家族（分割、分类、配准、视觉语言理解、临床检索）上匹配或超过之前的方法，嵌入能够组织CT扫描沿肿瘤分期的梯度分布。
AI.conclusion: CT基础模型能够捕获与疾病表型表征相关的成像特征，为CT领域提供了统一的基础模型资源。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于医学CT影像分析（CT扫描的分割、分类、配准、视觉语言理解），而研究档案关注的是计算机图形学中的三维人体运动生成（从2D视频提取姿态、动作合成、视频生成先验）。两者虽然都涉及视觉分析，但应用领域完全不同：医学生物影像 vs 计算机图形/人类动作生成。即使技术层面可能都用到深度学习方法，但核心应用场景完全不同。

title: Guided Trajectory Optimization with Sparse Scaling for Test-Time Diffusion
summary: The efficient Test-Time Scaling (TTS) paradigm offers a promising perspective for enhancing the generation performance of diffusion models. However, current solutions are limited to a static, pre-defined noise pool and suffer from inflexible noise exploration across the denoising trajectory. To bridge this gap, we propose RTS, a novel Reward-guided Trajectory Scaling method to fully unlock the generative potential of diffusion models. Unlike existing methods, RTS facilitates the synthesis of refined, high-fidelity images via two core innovations: 1) a reward-guided noise optimization strategy to actively direct the search towards promising regions; and 2) a sparse test-time scaling framework together with a PCA-driven curvature analysis scheme to prioritize key intermediate steps in the entire denoising space, effectively compressing the search space. Experiments show our approach outperforms baselines by 15.6% across GenEval Score, and a 60.4% enhancement in ImageReward score, setting a new SOTA while providing a practical guideline for more effective test-time scaling across diffusion-specific architectures.

AI.tldr: RTS是一种用于增强扩散模型生成性能的新方法，通过奖励引导的噪声优化和基于PCA曲率分析的稀疏测试时间缩放来解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前的测试时间缩放(TTS)方法受限于静态预定义噪声池，在去噪轨迹上缺乏灵活的噪声探索。作者认为需要一种能够主动引导搜索到有前景区域的方法，同时有效压缩搜索空间。
AI.method: 提出RTS方法，包含两个核心创新：1)奖励引导的噪声优化策略，主动引导搜索朝向有前景的区域；2)稀疏测试时间缩放框架结合PCA驱动的曲率分析，优先处理去噪空间中的关键中间步骤。
AI.result: 在GenEval Score上超越基线15.6%，在ImageReward分数上提升60.4%，达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: RTS成功解锁了扩散模型的生成潜力，为跨扩散特定架构的更有效测试时间缩放提供了实用指南。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses diffusion model optimization for IMAGE generation (using GenEval, ImageReward benchmarks), while the research profile requires 3D human motion extraction/generation from 2D video. Although both involve diffusion models, they represent completely different application domains: image generation vs. human motion generation. The pain points in the profile (VLM quality assessment for motion, visual-motion feature alignment, physical realism in motion) are not addressed. Robot/human motion generation is NOT the same as image generation, even using the same underlying technology.

title: MAVEN: A Multi-stage Agentic Annotation Pipeline for Video Reasoning Tasks
summary: Training Vision Language Models (VLMs) for video event reasoning requires high-quality structured annotations capturing not only what happened, but when, where, why, and with what consequence, at a scale manual labelling cannot support. We present MAVEN (Multi-stage Agentic Video Event aNnotation), a multi-stage agentic pipeline that turns raw videos into multi-task training data with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning traces, organized around a designated Event of Focus. At its core, MAVEN synthesizes a Multi-Scale Spatio-Temporal Event Description (MSTED) from three complementary caption levels; this explicit intermediate serves as the sole input to downstream Q&A generation across multiple task formats. Crucially, MAVEN supports agent-driven domain adaptation: given a new video dataset and target question examples, the agent redesigns all prompts top-down without manual re-engineering. A hierarchical refinement loop further classifies annotation errors against a taxonomy, traces root causes to the originating pipeline stage, and applies targeted edits that rewrite prompts or modify the pipeline structure itself, iteratively improving data quality. We apply MAVEN to label over 5,300 traffic videos and fine-tune Cosmos-Reason2-8B on the resulting data. On a private CCTV evaluation set, fine-tuning surpasses both Gemini 2.5 Pro and 3.1 Flash, including a $+38.8$-point gain in MCQ accuracy over zero-shot. On AccidentBench, CCTV-only training lifts Cosmos-Reason2 by $+10.7$ MCQ points and matches Gemini 2.5 Pro despite seeing no dashcam videos; adding agent-adapted dashcam annotations narrows the gap to Gemini 3.1 Flash, and RL post-training pushes overall performance past both Gemini baselines. Qualitative results on warehouse surveillance and public safety videos further show the agentic workflow readily adapts the pipeline to new domains.

AI.tldr: MAVEN是一个多阶段智能体管道,用于将原始视频转换为多任务训练数据,包含思维链推理痕迹。该系统生成多尺度时空事件描述(MSTED),作为下游问答生成的唯一输入,支持智能体驱动的领域自适应,可自动重新设计提示词而无需人工干预。应用于5300多个交通视频微调Cosmos-Reason2-8B后，在CCTV评估集上超越Gemini 2.5 Pro和3.1 Flash,在AccidentBench上提升10.7个MCQ百分点。
AI.motivation: 训练视频事件推理的视觉语言模型(VLM)需要高质量的结构化注释,捕获事件的what、when、where、why和后果,但手动标注无法支持大规模数据需求。
AI.method: 提出MAVEN多阶段智能体管道,核心是合成多尺度时空事件描述(MSTED),从三个互补caption级别生成。系统包含分层 refinement loop,根据分类法对注释错误进行分类,将根本原因追溯到源pipeline阶段,并应用针对性编辑来修改prompt或pipeline结构。包括agent驱动的领域自适应能力。
AI.result: 在CCTV评估集上,微调版本超越Gemini 2.5 Pro和3.1 Flash,比zero-shot提升38.8点MCQ准确率。AccidentBench上,CCTV-only训练使Cosmos-Reason2提升10.7点,与Gemini 2.5 Pro持平;添加agent适应的dashcam注释缩小与Gemini 3.1 Flash差距;RL后训练使整体性能超过两个Gemini基线。
AI.conclusion: MAVEN成功实现了大规模视频事件注释的自动化,通过多尺度时空事件描述和智能体驱动的领域自适应,显著提升了VLM在视频事件推理任务上的性能,且能有效迁移到新领域。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video reasoning/understanding for traffic CCTV videos (question answering task), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics focused on 3D human motion generation. Although both mention VLM, this paper uses VLM for video captioning and QA, not for motion quality assessment or 3D pose estimation. The research profile's pain points center on extracting 3D motion from 2D videos, ensuring natural motion generation, and aligning visual features with motion models - none of which are addressed by this paper. It's essentially a video understanding annotation system rather than a motion modeling work.

title: Active Evidence-Seeking and Diagnostic Reasoning in Large Language Models for Clinical Decision Support
summary: Large language models perform well on static medical examinations, yet clinical diagnosis often requires iterative evidence gathering under uncertainty. Building on prior interactive evaluation efforts, we introduce an OSCE-inspired standardized patient simulator and a controlled, reproducible benchmark for active diagnostic inquiry. Across 468 cases and 15 models in our protocol, we observe that multi-turn evidence seeking reduces diagnostic accuracy by 12.75% and lowers supporting-evidence quality by 24.36% relative to full-context evaluation; error analyses associate these drops with premature diagnostic closure and inefficient questioning. Together, these results suggest that static full-context benchmarks may overestimate performance in interactive evidence-seeking settings, motivating complementary interactive assessment for safer clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 研究提出的benchmark表明，多轮交互式诊断询问会导致AI模型性能显著下降，当前静态医学考试基准可能无法真实反映临床实用价值。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在静态医学考试中表现良好，但实际临床诊断需要迭代式证据收集。研究旨在建立OSCE风格的标准化患者模拟器和可控可复现的基准测试，用于评估主动诊断询问能力。
AI.method: 开发了OSCE启发的标准化患者模拟器，构建了受控可复现的主动诊断询问基准。涵盖468个病例和15个模型进行评估。
AI.result: 多轮证据寻求相比全上下文评估，诊断准确率降低12.75%，支持证据质量降低24.36%。错误分析与过早诊断闭环和低效提问相关。
AI.conclusion: 静态全上下文基准可能高估了在交互式证据寻求场景中的性能，需要补充交互式评估以支持更安全的临床决策支持。

title: SDGBiasBench: Benchmarking and Mitigating Vision--Language Models' Biases in Sustainable Development Goals
summary: Assessing progress toward the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) requires multi-step reasoning over visual cues, contextual knowledge, and development indicators, where incomplete evidence use and imperfect evidence integration can introduce hidden prediction biases. Real-world SDG monitoring further spans both qualitative judgments and quantitative estimation. However, existing benchmarks typically evaluate these aspects in isolation, obscuring systematic biases that emerge when models substitute priors for evidence. To address this gap, we propose SDGBiasBench, a large-scale benchmark suite for SDG-oriented vision-language reasoning. Spanning 500k expert-involved multiple-choice questions and 50k regression tasks, the benchmark enables comprehensive assessment of both decision-level and estimation-level bias in Vision--Language Models (VLMs). Evaluations on SDGBiasBench reveal an intrinsic SDG bias in current VLMs, where predictions are frequently driven by SDG specific priors rather than reliable multi-modal cues. To mitigate such bias, we propose CADE (Contrastive Adaptive Debias Ensemble), a training-free, plug-and-play method that leverages modality-specific answer priors. CADE yields significant gains on the proposed benchmark, improving multiple-choice accuracy by up to 25% and reducing regression MAE by up to 12 points across multiple VLMs. We hope our work can foster the development of more fair and reliable AI systems for sustainable development.

title: Enhancing Visual Token Representations for Video Large Language Models via Training-Free Spatial-Temporal Pooling and Gridding
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced video understanding tasks, yet challenges remain in efficiently compressing visual tokens while preserving spatiotemporal interactions. Existing methods, such as LLaVA family, utilize simplistic pooling or interpolation techniques that overlook the intricate dynamics of visual tokens. To bridge this gap, we propose ST-GridPool, a novel training-free visual token enhancement method designed specifically for Video LLMs. Our approach integrates Pyramid Temporal Gridding (PTG), which captures multi-grained spatiotemporal interactions through hierarchical temporal gridding, and Norm-based Spatial Pooling (NSP), which preserves high-information visual regions by leveraging the correlation between token norms and semantic richness. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that ST-GridPool consistently enhances performance of Video LLMs without requiring costly retraining. Our method offers an efficient and plug-and-play solution for improving visual token representations. Our code is available in https://github.com/bingjunluo/ST-GridPool.

AI.tldr: ST-GridPool是一种免训练的视频大型语言模型视觉Token增强方法，通过结合金字塔时间网格化和基于范数的空间池化，在保持多粒度时空交互的同时有效保留高信息量区域，从而提升Video LLM在视频理解任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有Video LLM（如LLaVA系列）采用简单的池化或插值技术，忽略了视觉Token的复杂动态特性，导致在 token 压缩效率与时空交互信息保留之间难以平衡。
AI.method: 提出ST-GridPool方法，核心包含两个创新模块：1）金字塔时间网格化(PTG)：通过分层时间网格捕获多粒度的时空交互；2）基于范数的空间池化(NSP)：利用Token范数与语义丰富度之间的相关性来保留高信息量的视觉区域。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，ST-GridPool能够在无需昂贵重训练的情况下，持续提升各种Video LLM的性能。
AI.conclusion: ST-GridPool作为一种无需重新训练的高效即插即用解决方案，可持续提升Video LLM的视觉Token表示效果，为视频理解领域的实际应用提供了实用的改进方向。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on Video LLM (Visual Language Model) for video understanding/comprehension tasks, not for 3D motion generation from video. The research profile is in Computer Graphics specifically targeting 3D human motion extraction and generation - what the user needs. However, this paper is about improving Video LLMs' ability to understand and compress video tokens for QA tasks. This is a fundamentally different application domain: video understanding vs motion generation. Even though the paper mentions VLM and temporal modeling, it does not address any of the pain points related to 3D motion extraction, pose estimation, motion naturalness, or physics realism.

title: Visual-Advantage On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: On-policy knowledge distillation has proven effective for language models, yet its application to vision-language models (VLMs) remains underexplored. We observe that standard on-policy distillation can improve a student's output quality while failing to strengthen its reliance on visual input: on vision-critical tokens, the student's predictions remain largely unchanged whether or not fine-grained visual detail is present, even though the teacher's predictions depend heavily on it.To make this difference observable, we introduce visual advantage (VA), the token-level log-probability difference when the teacher scores a student-generated rollout with versus without access to fine-grained visual detail. VA is concentrated in a small minority of tokens, and these high-VA tokens are the ones that actually carry the visual supervision signal. This motivates a distillation objective that treats them differently from language scaffolding, so their contribution is not diluted by the abundant surrounding language tokens.We propose Visual-Advantage On-Policy Distillation (VA-OPD), which uses VA at two granularities: rollout-level reweighting by trajectory-averaged VA, and token-level KL averaged within high-VA and low-VA groups separately. We train on two math datasets (Geometry3K and ViRL39K) and evaluate on eight benchmarks covering both mathematical reasoning and visual understanding, across three teacher sizes (4B, 8B, and 32B) on the Qwen3-VL family. VA-OPD improves over standard on-policy distillation on every benchmark, with the gain growing monotonically along both the teacher-size and data-scale axes, suggesting that these factors compound consistently.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉优势策略性蒸馏(VA-OPD)方法，用于将大型视觉语言模型的知识迁移到小模型。针对标准策略性蒸馏无法增强学生模型对视觉输入依赖的问题，作者引入视觉优势(VA)概念来衡量教师模型在有无细粒度视觉信息下的预测差异，并据此设计了两个粒度的蒸馏目标。
AI.motivation: 标准策略性蒸馏可以提升学生模型的输出质量，但无法增强其对视觉输入的依赖：在关键视觉token上，学生预测几乎不受细粒度视觉信息存在与否的影响，而教师预测却高度依赖这些信息。这导致视觉监督信号被大量语言token稀释。
AI.method: 提出了视觉优势策略性蒸馏(VA-OPD)，使用VA在两个层次进行蒸馏：(1)滚动级别重新加权，按轨迹平均VA值调整样本权重；(2)token级别KL散度，分别在高VA组和低VA组内单独计算，避免视觉监督信号被语言脚手架稀释。
AI.result: 在两个数学数据集(Geometry3K和ViRL39K)上训练，并在8个基准测试上评估，使用Qwen3-VL家族的三个教师规模(4B、8B、32B)。VA-OPD在所有基准上都优于标准策略性蒸馏，且提升幅度随教师规模和数据量增加而单调增长。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了视觉语言模型蒸馏中视觉信号分布不均匀的特点，通过区分高VA和低VA token实现更有效的知识迁移。教师规模和数据量的放大与该方法形成良好正循环，为大规模视觉语言模型的高效部署提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于视觉语言模型(VLM)的知识蒸馏，应用于数学问题解答领域(Geometry3K, ViRL39K数据集)。虽然使用了VLM和技术蒸馏方法，但应用领域完全错误：(1)论文聚焦于数学推理任务,而研究档案是计算机图形学/三维运动生成；(2)论文不涉及任何视频先验、姿态估计、时间建模或3D运动模型；(3)论文未解决研究档案中的核心痛点：2D视频到3D运动提取、视频生成先验、物理真实性等。这属于完全不同应用领域的AI研究,与计算机图形学的视频/运动生成任务几乎没有交集。

title: A Camera-Cooperative ISAC Framework for Multimodal Non-Cooperative UAVs Sensing
summary: The detection of non-cooperative unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) presents significant challenges for Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) systems due to the inherent limitations of single-modal perception and the competition for shared communication and sensing resources. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel Camera-Cooperative ISAC (CC-ISAC) framework that employs multimodal sensing to enable efficient UAV beam steering and tracking. The proposed framework employs cameras for coarse-grained airspace monitoring and utilizes ISAC for fine-grained, high-precision sensing, forming a complementary perception loop that enhances both sensing accuracy and resource efficiency. Within this framework, two key modules are developed: (1) a Vision-to-Echo Data Alignment (V2EDA) model that aligns visual and echo-domain features through cross-attention mechanisms, and (2) a Multimodal Fusion-Based Estimation (MMFE) model that integrates historical multimodal data with current observations for robust state estimation. Extensive evaluations conducted on the DeepSense 6G dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves an average reduction of 71% in beam steering overhead and 1.69-11.15% in tracking overhead while maintaining high angular estimation accuracy. The CC-ISAC framework effectively mitigates resource contention between sensing and communication, enabling reliable UAV surveillance while freeing substantial system resources for additional communication tasks, thereby representing a practical advancement in ISAC system design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种Camera-Cooperative ISAC (CC-ISAC)框架，用于解决非合作无人机的检测和跟踪问题。该框架结合了相机（粗粒度监测）和ISAC（细粒度高精度感知）的多模态感知，实现了高效的无人机波束转向和跟踪。
AI.motivation: 由于单一感知模式的固有局限性和通信与感知资源竞争问题，非合作无人机的检测对集成感知与通信(ISAC)系统提出了重大挑战。传统方法难以同时满足高精度传感和资源效率的需求。
AI.method: 提出CC-ISAC框架，包含两个关键模块：1)视觉-回波数据对齐(V2EDA)模型，通过交叉注意力机制对齐视觉和回波域特征；2)多模态融合估计(MMFE)模型，结合历史多模态数据和当前观测进行稳健状态估计。
AI.result: 在DeepSense 6G数据集上的广泛评估表明，该框架实现了平均波束转向开销降低71%，跟踪开销降低1.69-11.15%，同时保持高角度估计精度，有效缓解了传感与通信之间的资源竞争。
AI.conclusion: CC-ISAC框架代表ISAC系统设计的实用进展，能够实现可靠的无人机监控，同时释放大量系统资源用于额外通信任务，为未来集成感知与通信系统提供了新的技术方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) for drone detection and tracking - completely different from Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D human motion generation from video, while this paper deals with wireless sensing/radar for UAVs. No overlap in application domain: one is graphics/animation, the other is wireless communications and radar sensing.

title: EvoVid: Temporal-Centric Self-Evolution for Video Large Language Models
summary: Recent Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in video reasoning through reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing RL pipelines rely heavily on human-annotated tasks and solutions, making them costly to scale and fundamentally constrained by human expertise. Self-evolving frameworks have recently emerged as a promising alternative through autonomous Questioner-Solver self-play. Unfortunately, these approaches are primarily designed for static modalities such as text and images, fundamentally failing to capture the temporal dynamics that are central to video reasoning. In this work, we propose $\textbf{EvoVid}$, a temporal-centric self-evolving framework that enables Video-LLMs to improve directly from raw, unannotated videos. Specifically, we introduce two complementary temporal-centric rewards: a temporal-aware Questioner reward that encourages temporally dependent question generation through temporal perturbation sensitivity, and a temporal-grounded Solver reward that provides automatic temporal supervision via inherent video segment localization. Extensive experiments across four base models and six benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over both base models and existing self-evolving baselines, achieving competitive performance with supervised methods. These results highlight temporal-centric self-evolution as an effective and scalable paradigm for video understanding and reasoning.

AI.tldr: EvoVid是一个以时间为中心的自我演化框架，使视频大型语言模型能够从原始、未标注的视频中直接学习和改进。该框架提出了两个互补的时间中心奖励：时间感知的问题生成奖励和时间基础的求解器奖励。实验在四个基模型和六个基准上展示了相对于基模型和现有自我演化基线的持续提升，取得了与监督方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前的视频大型语言模型(Video-LLMs)强化学习 pipeline严重依赖人类注释的任务和解决方案，成本高且受限于人类专业知识。现有的自我演化框架主要针对静态模态（文本、图像）设计，无法捕捉视频推理核心的时间动态特性。
AI.method: 提出EvoVid框架，包含两个互补的时间中心奖励：(1)时间感知的问题生成奖励，通过时间扰动敏感度鼓励生成时间依赖性问题；(2)时间基础的求解器奖励，通过内在视频片段定位提供自动时间监督。
AI.result: 在四个基模型和六个基准上进行了广泛实验，展示了对基模型和现有自我演化基线的一致性提升，取得了与监督方法相当的竞争性能。
AI.conclusion: 以时间为中心的自我演化为视频理解和推理提供了一种有效且可扩展的范式。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的应用领域。该研究 profile 是关于计算机图形学中的三维运动生成（从2D视频中提取和恢复人体运动），而这篇论文是关于 Video-LLMs 的视频理解和时序推理（视频问答任务）。虽然两者都使用了 VLM（视觉语言模型），但应用场景完全不同：研究者需要 VLM 评估动作质量，而该论文用 VLM 做视频内容理解。此外，该论文不涉及扩散模型、三维运动模型、姿态估计或动作生成等核心技术。这是一个视频理解/对话任务，与三维运动恢复和生成相差甚远。

title: Knowledge Graph Re-engineering Along the Ontological Continuum (extended version)
summary: Knowledge graphs have become the primary vehicle for data integration and are critical to the success of modern AI, but the diversity of KG modelling practices, from lightweight vocabularies to richly axiomatised ontologies, makes integration and reuse expensive and brittle. This challenge is particularly acute in neuro-symbolic AI, where bridging neural and symbolic components depends on the ability to reengineer KGs to fit new requirements; GenAI now offers unprecedented automation capability, but without a principled understanding of the KG space, such automation remains conceptually ungrounded. We introduce the ontological continuum as that missing conceptualisation, a theoretical construct a theoretical construct whose characterisation framework is defined by two orthogonal distinctions: semantics vs pragmatics, and properties vs affordances; together these define a vocabulary to describe, compare, navigate, and transform KGs across the full range of modelling practices. The methodological stance is empirical: rather than prescribing how KGs should be modelled, the continuum aims to define a theory of the existent, derived from observation of real-world KG engineering practices and whose structure can be made formally explicit, for example, through Formal Concept Analysis (FCA). We ground the vision through a case study on provenance knowledge, showing how a single concern manifests differently across the continuum. We articulate five open research challenges and invite the community to develop the ontological continuum as a shared research agenda.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"本体论连续体"(ontological continuum)作为知识图谱(KG)建模实践的统一概念化框架，旨在解决KG多样性带来的集成和复用难题。该框架基于两个正交维度：语义vs实用性和属性vs可供性。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱已成为现代AI数据整合的关键载体，但KG建模实践的多样性（从轻量级词汇到丰富公理化本体）使得集成和复用变得昂贵且脆弱。在神经符号AI中，桥接神经和符号组件依赖于重新设计KG以适应新需求的能力。GenAI提供了自动化能力，但缺乏对KG空间的原则性理解。
AI.method: 采用经验主义方法论：通过观察真实世界KG工程实践来定义"存在理论"。使用形式概念分析(FCA)等方法使结构正式明确。框架由两个正交区分定义：语义vs实用性和属性vs可供性。
AI.result: 提出一个表征框架，用于描述、比较、导航和转换跨各种建模实践的KGs。通过关于 provenance knowledge 的案例研究展示单一关注点如何在不同建模实践下表现不同。提出五个开放研究挑战作为社区共同研究议程。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为KG建模实践提供了理论基础和通用词汇，促进了不同建模方法之间的理解和转化。为神经符号AI和GenAI的 KG 工程提供了原则性指导框架。

relevance_reason: 该论文完全无关。主题是知识图谱(knowledge graph)的本体论建模，与计算机图形学/3D运动生成毫无关系。不涉及任何视频处理、姿态估计、扩散模型、视频先验或VLM等该研究profile所需的方法。应用领域完全不同。

title: MLLMs Know When Before Speaking: Revealing and Recovering Temporal Grounding via Attention Cues
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG), which localizes the start and end times of a queried event in an untrimmed video, is a key test of whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) understand not only what happens but also when it happens. Although modern MLLMs describe video content fluently, their timestamp predictions remain unreliable, while existing remedies either require costly post-training on temporal annotations or rely on coarse training-free heuristics. In this work, we probe the cross-modal attention of MLLMs and uncover a perception-generation gap. Our key finding is that MLLMs often know the target interval during prefill, but lose this signal when generating the final answer. In the prefill stage, a sparse set of attention heads, which we call \emph{Temporal Grounding Heads} (TG-Heads), concentrates query-to-video attention on the ground-truth interval. During autoregressive decoding, however, the answer tokens shift attention away from this interval toward visually salient but query-irrelevant segments. This observation motivates an inference-time read-then-regenerate framework. We first convert TG-Head prefill attention into a debiased frame-level relevance signal and extract the high-attention interval it highlights. We then re-invoke the MLLM with visual context restricted to this interval, using video cropping or attention masking to suppress distractors. Without parameter updates and architectural changes, our framework consistently improves MiMo-VL-7B, Qwen3-VL-8B, and TimeLens-8B on three VTG benchmarks, with gains of up to +3.5 mIoU. The project website can be found at https://ddz16.github.io/mllmsknowwhen.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频时序定位(VTG)任务，通过探查MLLMs跨模态注意力发现感知-生成差距：预填充阶段模型已知目标区间，但解码时丢失该信号。据此提出推理时读取然后重新生成框架，无需训练即提升多个模型在VTG基准上的性能，mIoU增益最高+3.5。
AI.motivation: 现代多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)虽然能流利描述视频内容，但时间戳预测仍不可靠。现有补救方法要么需要耗时的 temporally annotated 后训练，要么依赖粗糙的无训练启发式方法。研究旨在探查MLLMs是否实际知道事件发生的时间。
AI.method: 通过探查MLLMs的跨模态注意力，发现预填充阶段存在专注于真理区间的稀疏注意力头（TG-Heads），而自回归解码阶段注意力偏离目标区间。提出推理时"读取然后重新生成"框架：1)将TG-Head预填充注意力转换为去偏的帧级相关性信号并提取高注意力区间；2)通过视频裁剪或注意力掩码抑制干扰项，重新调用MLLM并将视觉上下文限制在该区间内。
AI.result: 在三个VTG基准测试上，MiMo-VL-7B、Qwen3-VL-8B 和 TimeLens-8B 一致获得改进，mIoU增益高达 +3.5，且无需参数更新和架构改变。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种无需参数更新和架构改变的推理时框架，通过利用TG-Head的跨模态注意力来解决VTG任务。该框架读取然后重新生成，在预填充阶段提取高注意力区间，然后重新调用模型时限制视觉上下文到该区间。实验表明在三个VTG基准测试上的一致改进，mIoU提升高达+3.5。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Video Temporal Grounding (VTG), which is a video understanding/localization task, completely different from Computer Graphics motion generation. Although both deal with video, this paper focuses on temporal event detection ("when" events happen), not 3D motion extraction/recovery from 2D videos. The pain points in the profile center on 3D motion generation from video (pose estimation, motion recovery), while this paper concerns improving timestamp prediction in multimodal LLMs without training. There's no relation to diffusion models for motion generation, pose estimation, or 3D motion modeling. This is a computer vision/NLP paper at best.

title: MPDocBench-Parse: Benchmarking Practical Multi-page Document Parsing
summary: Document parsing converts visually rich documents into machine-readable structured representations, forming a crucial foundation for information systems. Although many benchmarks have been proposed for document parsing, they remain inadequate for realistic scenarios. Existing benchmarks either focus on specific tasks or assess only single-page, text-centric settings, making them insufficient for practical multi-page parsing. Moreover, they lack fine-grained evaluation of semantic continuity, hierarchical structure recovery, and visual content preservation. To address these gaps, we propose MPDocBench-Parse, a benchmark for multi-page document parsing in real-world applications. It contains 433 manually annotated documents with 3,246 pages, covering 15 document types in English and Chinese, with diverse layout styles, and supports document-level end-to-end evaluation. We further design a comprehensive protocol for content fidelity and logical structure, covering text, table, and formula recognition, truncated text and table merging, figure extraction, reading order, and heading hierarchy recovery. Experiments show that, while existing models perform well on basic text extraction, they still suffer clear limitations in semantic continuity integration, visual content parsing, and hierarchical structure recovery. MPDocBench-Parse provides a unified foundation for advancing document parsing toward more realistic scenarios.

AI.tldr: MPDocBench-Parse是一个用于真实世界多页文档解析的基准测试，旨在解决现有文档解析基准的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有文档解析基准存在以下不足：(1) 只关注特定任务或单页文本设置；(2) 无法满足实际多页解析需求；(3) 缺乏对语义连续性、层次结构恢复和视觉内容保存的细粒度评估。
AI.method: 研究人员提出MPDocBench-Parse基准，包含433个手动标注的文档(共3,246页)，涵盖15种英中文档类型，并设计了全面的内容保真度和逻辑结构评估协议，支持文本、表格和公式识别，以及截断文本合并、图表提取、阅读顺序和标题层次结构恢复等功能。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有模型在基本文本提取方面表现良好，但在语义连续性集成、视觉内容解析和层次结构恢复方面仍存在明显局限。
AI.conclusion: MPDocBench-Parse为推动文档解析向更现实场景发展提供了统一基础，有望促进该领域的技术进步。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于多页文档解析(Document Parsing)的基准测试，涉及文本提取、表格识别、公式识别等任务，与计算机图形学中的三维运动生成、视频生成、人体姿态估计等应用领域完全无关。research profile关注的pain points都是从2D视频提取三维运动、使用VLM评估生成质量、视频先验去噪等，而该论文属于文档理解/OCR领域，不涉及任何motion generation、diffusion models用于视频/动作生成、或pose estimation等方法。

title: Bounding-Box Trajectories Matter for Video Anomaly Detection
summary: Video anomaly detection is critical for public safety and security, yet remains highly challenging despite extensive research due to large variations in appearance, viewpoint, and scene dynamics. Among existing approaches, human pose-based methods have emerged as a major line of research, showing strong performance since many anomalies in public datasets involve humans and pose representations are robust to appearance changes while providing compact motion descriptions. However, these methods often overlook bounding-box trajectories, although such information is inherently available in pose-based pipelines. In this paper, we explicitly leverage these trajectories as a primary anomaly cue. We present TrajVAD, a framework that models multi-class bounding-box trajectories using normalizing flows to learn normal kinematic patterns. Its trajectory-only variant (TrajVAD-T) eliminates pose estimation and surpasses all compared pose-based methods on ShanghaiTech in AP (87.7%), while achieving the best results on MSAD. An extended version (TrajVAD-P) incorporates pose information and further improves performance to 88.6% AUROC and 90.9% AP on ShanghaiTech, highlighting bounding-box trajectories as an effective yet underexplored modality for video anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrajVAD框架，利用边界框轨迹结合归一化流模型学习正常运动模式，用于视频异常检测。纯轨迹版本TrajVAD-T无需姿态估计即超越所有对比的姿态方法，AP达87.7%；结合姿态信息的TrajVAD-P进一步提升至88.6% AUROC和90.9% AP。
AI.motivation: 视频异常检测对公共安全至关重要但极具挑战性。现有姿态方法虽表现良好且对外观变化鲁棒，但忽略了边界框轨迹信息。实际上这些轨迹在姿态检测流程中天然存在，是一种尚未被充分探索的有效模态。
AI.method: 提出TrajVAD框架，使用归一化流(normalizing flows)来学习多类别边界框轨迹的正常运动模式。包含两个变体：TrajVAD-T仅使用轨迹信息；TrajVAD-P额外融合姿态信息。
AI.result: TrajVAD-T在ShanghaiTech数据集上AP达87.7%，超越所有姿态方法；TrajVAD-P结合姿态后进一步提升至88.6% AUROC和90.9% AP，在MSAD上也取得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 边界框轨迹是视频异常检测中一种有效但未被充分探索的模态。纯轨迹方法即可取得优异性能，结合姿态信息可进一步提升。这为该领域提供了新的研究方向和简单有效的检测思路。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于视频异常检测(VAD)的应用领域，虽然也用到pose estimation和trajectory，但核心任务是识别监控视频中的异常行为，而非从2D视频提取恢复3D运动信息或生成自然的三维动作。这与research profile中要求的3D motion generation、diffusion models用于动作生成、视频先验用于动作生成的场景完全不同。方法上使用的是normalizing flows而非diffusion models。尽管都涉及pose estimation，但应用目的不同。

title: ExComm: Exploration-Stage Communication for Error-Resilient Agentic Test-Time Scaling
summary: A common failure mode in long-horizon agentic test-time scaling is error propagation, where factual errors or invalid deductions introduced at intermediate steps persist in the agent's belief state and contaminate later reasoning. Existing test-time scaling methods provide limited control over this process, as they often rely on agents to detect their own mistakes, select among flawed trajectories, or refine solutions only after errors have already shaped the reasoning path. We propose ExComm, a communication protocol for exploration-stage agentic test-time scaling. ExComm is motivated by the empirical observation that the majority of intermediate errors in parallel agentic reasoning produce detectable cross-agent factual conflicts. Leveraging the iterative structure of agentic workflows, ExComm periodically audits agent belief states to detect such conflicts, resolves them through a dedicated tool-based verification loop, and returns concise, targeted feedback to the involved agents. Corrections are incorporated through soft belief updates, which append verified feedback rather than overwriting existing beliefs. Furthermore, to prevent collapsing trajectory diversity due to communication, ExComm further introduces a trajectory diversification module that redirects redundant trajectories toward orthogonal strategies. Experiments on AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and GAIA with Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite and Qwen3.5-4B show that ExComm consistently outperforms strong test-time scaling baselines, achieving average performance gains of 5.7% and 5.0% over the best-performing baselines, respectively. Further analyses demonstrate improved error recovery, favorable scaling behavior, stronger diversity than adapted communication baselines, and the best performance-cost trade-off among the evaluated methods.

AI.tldr: ExComm是一种用于探索阶段智能体测试时扩展的通信协议，通过检测跨智能体事实冲突并使用工具验证环解析冲突，返回针对性反馈进行软信念更新，同时引入轨迹多样化模块维持轨迹多样性，显著提升了长程推理任务中的错误恢复能力和整体性能。
AI.motivation: 长程智能体测试时扩展中的错误传播是主要失败模式，现有测试时扩展方法对错误控制有限，因为它们依赖智能体自我检测错误、选择有缺陷的轨迹或在错误已污染推理路径后才改进方案。论文观察到大多数中间错误会产生可检测的跨智能体事实冲突，这为错误控制提供了新思路。
AI.method: 提出ExComm通信协议，包含三个核心组件：1）跨智能体事实冲突检测：定期审计智能体信念状态，检测并行推理中产生的可检测的跨智能体事实冲突；2）基于工具的验证环：调用专用工具解析冲突并返回简洁有针对性的反馈；3）软信念更新：通过追加而非覆盖的方式将验证后的反馈整合到智能体信念中；以及4）轨迹多样化模块：将冗余轨迹重定向到正交策略以维持轨迹多样性。
AI.result: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和GAIA基准上，使用Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite和Qwen3.5-4B进行实验，ExComm一致优于强测试时扩展基线，平均性能增益分别为5.7%和5.0%。进一步分析表明实现了更好的错误恢复、有利的扩展行为、更强的多样性优于适配的通信基线，且具有最佳的性能-成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: ExComm通过跨智能体事实冲突检测与验证工具环实现了有效的错误恢复，其软信念更新机制保留了有价值的信息。轨迹多样化模块防止了通信导致的轨迹多样性崩溃。在AIME 2024/2025和GAIA基准上，使用Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite和Qwen3.5-4B进行实验，ExComm始终优于强基线方法，平均性能提升5.7%和5.0%，且具有最佳的性能-成本权衡。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于LLM智能体的测试时扩展和多智能体通信，用于长程推理任务，属于AI/语言模型研究领域，与计算机图形学中的三维运动生成、视频姿态估计等应用完全不相关。虽然可能涉及VLM，但使用方法的是智能体推理系统，而非视频理解或运动生成。痛点也不匹配——该论文解决的是推理错误传播问题，而不是从2D视频提取三维运动、VLM质量评估、或生成动作的自然性等问题。

title: Dual-Integrated Low-Latency Single-Lens Infrared Computational Imaging for Object Detection
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures; supplementary material: 3 pages, 2 figures
summary: Computational imaging enables compact infrared systems, but deep-learning pipelines that combine image reconstruction and object detection often introduce substantial inference latency. Most existing acceleration strategies compress the reconstruction network while overlooking physical priors from the optical path, leaving a trade-off between accuracy and speed. We present Physics-aware Dual-Integrated Network (PDI-Net), a low-latency framework that integrates infrared reconstruction with object detection and further embeds optical priors into the learning process. PDI-Net uses a supervised U-Net during training, while a semi-U-Net encoder shares features directly with a YOLO-based detector during inference, avoiding full image reconstruction. To bridge the gap between fidelity-oriented reconstruction features and detection-oriented semantics, we introduce a physics-aware large-small bridge (PALS-Bridge), which uses field-dependent point spread function priors to adaptively modulate multiscale convolutional branches. A physics-informed optical degradation simulation pipeline is also developed for training and validation. The method is deployed on a single-lens infrared camera, reducing system weight by about 50% compared with traditional multi-lens designs. On the M3FD benchmark under low-SNR conditions, PDI-Net reduces inference time by 84.06% compared with the Rec+Det with pruning strategy while improving mAP@0.5:0.95 by 5.07%. These results demonstrate compact, low-latency computational infrared imaging for real-time object detection on resource-constrained platforms.

AI.tldr: 研究团队提出PDI-Net框架，实现低延迟红外成像目标检测，整合图像重建与目标检测，通过物理感知桥接技术嵌入光学先验，在单镜头红外相机上实现84.06%延迟降低和5.07%精度提升。
AI.motivation: 计算成像虽能实现紧凑型红外系统，但结合重建与检测的深度学习管道引入了高推理延迟；现有加速策略忽略光学路径的物理先验，导致精度与速度之间存在权衡。
AI.method: 提出Physics-aware Dual-Integrated Network(PDI-Net)：训练时使用监督U-Net，推理时用半U-Net编码器直接与YOLO检测器共享特征避免完整重建；引入PALS-Bridge利用场相关PSF先验自适应调节多尺度卷积；开发物理信息光学退化模拟管道。
AI.result: 在M3FD基准低SNR条件下：推理时间较Rec+Det剪枝策略降低84.06%，mAP@0.5:0.95提升5.07%；系统重量较传统多镜头设计减轻约50%。
AI.conclusion: PDI-Net实现了资源受限平台上的紧凑低延迟计算红外成像和实时目标检测，为单镜头红外相机提供了高效的端到端解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about infrared computational imaging and object detection using physics-aware networks - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. It has no relation to 3D motion generation from 2D videos, human pose estimation, diffusion models, VLM-based quality assessment, or video generation priors. The application domain is computer vision for infrared sensing, not computer graphics for motion synthesis. Zero methodological overlap with the research profile.

title: ArborKV: Structure-Aware KV Cache Management for Scaling Tree-based LLM Reasoning
summary: Recent progress in LLM reasoning has increasingly shifted from single-pass generation to explicit search over intermediate reasoning states. Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT) organizes inference to tree-structured search with branching and backtracking, but it substantially amplifies the Key--Value (KV) cache: retaining KV states for a frontier of partial trajectories quickly becomes a memory bottleneck that limits throughput and constrains search depth and width under fixed hardware budgets. We address this challenge by observing that KV reuse in ToT-style inference is governed by search dynamics: near-term decoding depends primarily on the active branch and its ancestors, whereas inactive subtrees have low short-term reuse probability yet must remain recoverable for backtracking. Motivated by this, we propose ArborKV, a structure-aware eviction framework that couples a lightweight value estimator with a tree-aware allocation policy, and performs purely token-extractive eviction with lazy rehydration to support revisits. Experiments on ToT-style reasoning benchmarks show that ArborKV achieves up to ~4x peak KV-memory reduction while preserving near-full-retention accuracy, enabling larger search configurations under fixed device budgets that would otherwise run out of memory.

AI.tldr: 本文针对 Tree-of-Thoughts 推理中 KV 缓存快速膨胀的问题，提出了 ArborKV 结构感知驱逐框架。该框架通过价值估计器、树感知分配策略和惰性再水合机制，在保持高精度的同时实现约 4 倍的 KV 内存削减，有效突破了内存瓶颈对推理搜索深度和宽度的限制。
AI.motivation: Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT) 推理虽能提升 LLM 的推理能力，但其树状搜索结构导致 KV 缓存急剧膨胀，成为内存瓶颈，限制了搜索的深度和宽度。受限于硬件预算，难以同时维护大量部分轨迹的 KV 状态。
AI.method: 提出 ArborKV，这是一种结构感知的驱逐框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 轻量级价值估计器，用于预测各 KV 状态的未来重用概率；2) 树感知的分配策略，根据搜索树结构优化内存分配；3) 纯 Token 提取式驱逐与惰性再水合，支持回溯时的状态恢复。
AI.result: 在 ToT 风格推理基准测试中，ArborKV 可实现高达约 4 倍的峰值 KV 内存削减，同时保持接近完整的保留精度，使系统能够在固定硬件预算下支持更大的搜索配置。
AI.conclusion: ArborKV 通过利用搜索动态特性，实现了 KV 缓存的高效管理，为 ToT 等复杂推理范式在大规模实际应用中的部署提供了可行的内存优化方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about KV cache management for LLM Tree-of-Thoughts reasoning, which is entirely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from video, visual quality assessment, pose estimation, and related computer graphics tasks. This paper addresses LLM memory optimization and inference scaling - completely different field. No relevant methods or application areas overlap.

title: Foresee-to-Ground: From Predictive Temporal Perception to Evidence-Driven Reasoning for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Current Video-LLM approaches for Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) typically rely on direct timestamp generation from an unstructured visual-token stream, often leading to brittle numerics and inconsistent boundaries. To address this, we propose Foresee-to-Ground (F2G), a framework that reformulates VTG as a verifiable Identify-then-Measure problem. F2G integrates Predictive Temporal Perception with Evidence-Driven Reasoning: it learns boundary-sensitive temporal representations to build a video-wide evidence pool of candidate event segments, and exposes these segments to the LLM as citable evidence units that bind boundary prediction to explicit event hypotheses. By decoupling event identification from precise boundary measurement, F2G stabilizes grounding and makes predictions verifiable. Extensive experiments demonstrate that F2G consistently improves grounding accuracy across diverse benchmarks, transfers robustly across different Video-LLM backbones, and preserves general video understanding capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出F2G框架，将视频时序定位(VTG)重新定义为"识别-然后测量"问题，通过边界敏感的时序表示构建证据池，使LLM能够引用明确的证据单元，从而解决传统方法中数值不稳定和边界不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前的Video-LLM方法在视频时序定位任务中，直接从无结构的视觉token流生成时间戳，导致数值不稳定(brittle numerics)和边界不一致(inconsistent boundaries)的问题。
AI.method: 提出Foresee-to-Ground (F2G)框架，整合Predictive Temporal Perception与Evidence-Driven Reasoning：(1)学习边界敏感的时序表示，构建覆盖全视频的候选事件段证据池；(2)将这些片段作为可引用的证据单元(cilable evidence units)暴露给LLM，将边界预测与显式事件假设绑定。通过解耦event identification与precise boundary measurement来稳定定位。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明：F2G在不同基准数据集上持续提升定位精度；能robustly transfer到不同的Video-LLM backbone；并保留了原有的general video understanding能力。
AI.conclusion: F2G通过将VTG reformulate为可验证的Identify-then-Measure问题，有效解决了传统方法的数值不稳定问题，使预测变得可验证并在多个维度表现出色。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) - locating specific moments in videos using VLMs. While it mentions temporal modeling, it's focused on video understanding/reasoning rather than motion generation/recovery. The research profile's pain points are about extracting 3D motion from 2D videos, pose estimation, and generating natural human motions - which are fundamentally different from video temporal grounding. This belongs to the Video-LLM/Vision Language domain rather than Computer Graphics motion generation. Additionally, there is no mention of diffusion models, 3D motion generation, pose estimation, or physical真实性 (physical realism) which are central to the profile.

title: Perception or Prejudice: Can MLLMs Go Beyond First Impressions of Personality?
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly deployed in human-facing roles where personality perception is critical, yet existing benchmarks evaluate this capability solely on numerical Big Five score prediction, leaving open whether models truly perceive personality through behavioral understanding or merely prejudge through superficial pattern matching. We address this gap with three contributions. (i) A new task: we formalize Grounded Personality Reasoning (GPR), which requires MLLMs to anchor each Big Five rating in observable evidence through a chain of rating, reasoning, and grounding. (ii) A new dataset: we release MM-OCEAN (1,104 videos, 5,320 MCQs), produced by a multi-agent pipeline with human verification, with timestamped behavioral observations, evidence-grounded trait analyses, and seven categories of cue-grounding MCQs. (iii) Benchmark and analysis: we design a three-tier evaluation (rating, reasoning, grounding) plus four sample-level failure-mode metrics: Prejudice Rate (PR), Confabulation Rate (CR), Integration-failure Rate (IR), and Holistic-grounding Rate (HR), and benchmark 27 MLLMs (13 closed, 14 open). The analysis uncovers a striking Prejudice Gap: across the field, 51% of correct ratings are not grounded in retrieved cues, and the Holistic-Grounding Rate spans only 0-33.5%. These findings expose a disconnect between getting the right score and reasoning for the right reason, charting a roadmap for grounded social cognition in MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态大语言模型的人格感知能力评估，提出新任务GPR、新数据集MM-OCEAN及三层评估框架。实验发现当前模型存在严重的"偏见差距"：多数正确评分缺乏行为证据支撑，表明模型可能只是在表面模式下预测分数而非真正理解人格行为。
AI.motivation: 现有基准评估仅关注数值Big Five分数预测，未检验模型是否真正通过行为理解感知人格，还是仅通过表面模式匹配进行判断。这是一个关键的能力差距。
AI.method: 提出三项贡献：(1)新任务-扎根人格推理(GPR)，要求MLLM将每个Big Five评分锚定在可观察证据中；(2)新数据集-MM-OCEAN(1104视频，5320道MCQ)，通过多智能体管道生成并经人工验证；(3)设计三层评估(评分、推理、扎根)及四个失败模式指标：偏见率、虚构率、整合失败率、整体扎根率，benchmark了27个MLLM。
AI.result: 揭示了显著的"偏见差距"：整个领域中51%的正确评分并未扎根于检索到的线索，整体扎根率仅为0-33.5%。
AI.conclusion: 发现模型在获得正确分数与为正确原因推理之间存在脱节，为MLLM的扎根社会认知研究提供了路线图。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文研究的是多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的人格感知能力评估，属于AI/ML评估领域，与计算机图形学毫无关系。虽然都涉及VLM/MLLM，但应用场景完全不同——论文关注人格推断和偏见评估，而非3D运动生成、视频质量评估或姿态估计。即使方法有部分重叠（如用到视频数据），但应用目标和领域完全不同。

title: Video as Natural Augmentation: Towards Unified AI-Generated Image and Video Detection
summary: AI-generated content (AIGC) is rapidly improving, creating an urgent need for detectors that generalize across data sources, deployment pipelines, and visual modalities. A strongly generalizable detector should remain robust under distributional variations. However, we identify a consistent failure mode: SOTA AI-generated image detectors often collapse when applied to frames extracted from videos. Through systematic analysis, we show that this cross-modal gap arises from both entangled synthesis-agnostic video processing shifts, including color conversion, codec compression, resizing, and blur, and model-specific fingerprints introduced by modern video generators. Motivated by these findings, we propose VINA (Video as Natural Augmentation), a unified AIGC detection framework that jointly trains on image and video data. VINA uses video frames as physically grounded natural augmentations and further introduces a cross-modal supervised contrastive objective to align image and video representations under a shared real/fake decision boundary. Extensive experiments on 14 image, video, and in-the-wild benchmarks show that VINA delivers bidirectional gains, improves robustness and transferability, and achieves state-of-the-art performance across nearly all evaluated settings without complex augmentation or dataset-specific tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文针对AI生成图像检测器在视频帧上失效的问题进行分析，发现原因包括视频处理变化（如色彩转换、编解码器压缩、缩放、模糊）和现代视频生成器的特定模型指纹。提出VINA框架通过联合训练图像和视频数据并使用跨模态监督对比目标来解决跨模态差距。
AI.motivation: SOTA AI生成图像检测器在应用于视频帧时存在严重的泛化失败问题，这是一个关键的实际应用障碍
AI.method: 提出了VINA框架，通过将视频帧作为自然增强进行联合训练，并引入跨模态监督对比目标来对齐图像和视频表示
AI.result: VINA在14个图像、视频和真实场景基准测试中实现了双向增益，提高了鲁棒性和可迁移性，在几乎所有评估设置中都达到最先进的性能
AI.conclusion: VINA是一个有效的AIGC检测统一框架，无需复杂的增强或数据集特定调优即可实现良好的跨模态泛化

relevance_reason: 完全无关的不同应用领域。该论文是关于AI生成图像/视频检测（detection/classification），而研究档案需要的是从2D视频中提取和恢复三维运动信息（motion extraction/generation）。虽然都用到了扩散模型，但应用领域完全不同：一个是为鉴别AI生成的假图像/视频，另一个是从视频中生成人体运动。当前论文的核心方法是训练检测器来区分真实与AI生成内容，与3D运动生成、姿态估计、视频动作建模等需求毫无关联。

title: Interpreting and Enhancing Emotional Circuits in Large Vision-Language Models via Cross-Modal Information Flow
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) represent a significant leap towards empathetic agents, demonstrating remarkable capabilities in emotion understanding. However, the internal mechanisms governing how LVLMs translate abstract visual stimuli into coherent emotional narratives remain largely unexplored, primarily due to the scarcity of visual counterfactuals and the diffuse nature of emotional expression. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing a steering-vector-based causal attribution framework tailored for descriptive emotional reasoning. To this end, we construct a specialized dataset to demystify the emotional circuits underlying the three-stage ``Adapt-Aggregate-Execute'' mechanism. Crucially, we discover a functional decoupling: visual emotional cues are aggregated in middle layers via sentiment-specific attention heads, but are subsequently translated into narrative generation in deep layers through emotion-general pathways. Guided by these insights, we regulate the emotional information routing to strengthen attention flow and amplify the semantic activation to consolidate expression. Extensive experiments on the comprehensive MER-UniBench demonstrate that our methods significantly improve performance via inference-time intervention, effectively mitigating emotional hallucinations and corroborating the causal fidelity of the discovered circuits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于 steering-vector 的因果归因框架，用于分析大视觉语言模型（LVLMs）如何将视觉刺激转化为情绪推理能力，并发现了情绪回路中"适应-聚合-执行"三阶段机制的功能解耦现象。
AI.motivation: LVLMs 在情绪理解方面展现出显著能力，但其内部将视觉刺激转化为连贯情绪叙事的机制尚不明确，主要原因是视觉反事实样本稀缺且情绪表达分散。
AI.method: 构建专门数据集，提出 steering-vector 因果归因框架，分析"Adapt-Aggregate-Execute"三阶段机制。通过调节情绪信息路由来增强注意力流动和语义激活。
AI.result: 发现功能解耦：视觉情绪线索在中间层通过情感特定注意头聚合，但在深层通过情绪通用路径转化为叙事生成。在 MER-UniBench 上证实推理时干预可显著提升性能，有效减轻情绪幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了 LVLMs 情绪推理的因果机制，为通过推理时干预改善情绪理解和减少幻觉提供了新途径。

relevance_reason: 这是关于LVLMs(大视觉语言模型)中情绪推理机制的 interpretability 研究，与计算机图形学中的三维运动生成完全无关。应用领域完全不同：论文研究的是AI情绪理解和幻觉问题，而研究档案关注的是从2D视频提取3D运动的动作生成。即使都涉及VLM，但使用方法和应用目的完全不同。该论文对解决任何Pain Points都没有帮助。

title: Ratchet: A Minimal Hygiene Recipe for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
comment: 16 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Extends arXiv:2605.19576 with the SWE-bench Verified evaluation and a non-divergence analysis (Proposition 1)
summary: Self-evolving skill libraries, pioneered by Voyager, let frozen LLM agents accumulate reusable knowledge without weight updates, yet recent evaluation shows that LLM-authored skills deliver $+0.0$pp over no-skill baselines while human-curated ones deliver $+16.2$pp: the bottleneck is not skill authoring but lifecycle management. We introduce \textbf{Ratchet}, a single-agent loop in which a frozen LLM writes, retrieves, curates, and retires its own natural-language skills. Ratchet integrates four candidate hygiene mechanisms: outcome-driven retirement, a bounded active-cap, meta-skill authoring guidance, and pattern canonicalisation. On MBPP+ hard-100 with Claude Opus 4.7, Ratchet lifts held-out pass@1 from a $0.258 \pm 0.047$ baseline to a late-window rolling mean of $0.584$ (peak $0.658 \pm 0.042$) across 100 rounds and 3 seeds, a $+0.328 \pm 0.018$ rolling-mean gain where the no-skill control drifts at $+0.002 \pm 0.005$; the same recipe transfers to an agentic solver on SWE-bench Verified ($+0.22$ peak lift over 20 rounds). Eight ablations (A1--A8) reveal that the minimal working recipe is smaller than our design suggests: retirement and the meta-skill authoring prior are load-bearing, while explicit deduplication (canonicalisation, cover-guard) is subsumed by the meta-skill itself. A non-divergence proposition shows that bounded cap and retirement threshold together prevent expected performance from drifting below the no-skills floor.

AI.tldr: Ratchet是一种单智能体循环，让冻结的LLM自主编写、检索、策划和淘汰自然语言技能，解决技能生命周期管理问题。在MBPP+ hard-100上pass@1从0.258提升至0.584（峰值0.658），+0.328增益；在SWE-bench Verified上获得+0.22提升。退休机制和元技能创作先验是核心组件。
AI.motivation: 现有自演进技能库（如Voyager）中，LLM创作的技能仅带来+0.0pp增益，而人类策划的技能可达+16.2pp。瓶颈不在技能创作本身，而在于技能的生命周期管理——包括技能的选择、整合与淘汰机制。
AI.method: 提出Ratchet框架，包含四个候选清洁机制：(1)结果驱动的技能退休 outcome-driven retirement，(2)有界活动上限 bounded active-cap，(3)元技能创作指导 meta-skill authoring guidance，(4)模式规范化 pattern canonicalisation。单智能体循环让冻结LLM自主完成技能的编写、检索、策划和淘汰。
AI.result: 在MBPP+ hard-100基准测试上（使用Claude Opus 4.7），Ratchet将pass@1从基线0.258±0.047提升至late-window滚动平均0.584（峰值0.658±0.042）， Gain为+0.328±0.018；无技能控制组漂移仅+0.002±0.005。该方法迁移到SWE-bench Verified，20轮内获得+0.22峰值提升。八组消融实验证明：退休机制和元技能创作先验是关键负载bearing组件；显式去重被元技能自身吸收。
AI.conclusion: 技能生命周期管理是解锁LLM自主技能累积的关键。有界活动上限和退休阈值共同防止性能低于无技能基线。最小工作配方比初始设计更精简：退休机制和元技能创作先验是必要的，显式去重（规范化、覆盖守卫）可被元技能本身替代。

relevance_reason: 完全无关领域。该论文关于LLM Agent的技能生命周期管理，用于代码生成（MBPP+）和软件工程（SWEBench）任务。完全没有涉及Computer Graphics领域的任何内容：没有3D运动生成、没有姿态估计、没有视频先验、没有人体动作恢复。应用领域完全不同，属于人工智能/LLM系统研究而非计算机图形学。

title: RiT: Vanilla Diffusion Transformers Suffice in Representation Space
summary: Flow matching with $x$-prediction -- regressing the clean data point rather than the ambient velocity -- is known to exploit low-dimensional manifold structure effectively in pixel space \cite{li2025back}. We ask whether a pretrained representation space, while containing a low-dimensional data manifold of comparable intrinsic dimensionality, offers a distribution more favorable for flow-matching learning. Comparing pixel, SD-VAE, and DINOv2 features along four geometric axes, we find that pixel and DINOv2 share nearly identical intrinsic dimensionalities (both $\hat{d}\!\approx\!33$) yet DINOv2 exhibits $7.3\times$ higher effective rank, $35\times$ better covariance conditioning, $11.5\times$ lower excess kurtosis, and $1.7\times$ lower on-manifold interpolation error; SD-VAE latents are consistently intermediate, indicating that the advantage stems from representation-learning objectives rather than mere compression. These statistical properties render the flow-matching regression well-conditioned and remove the need for the specialized prediction heads or Riemannian transport used by prior DINOv2 diffusion methods. We propose the \emph{Representation Image Transformer} (RiT): a vanilla Diffusion Transformer trained by $x$-prediction on frozen DINOv2 features, augmented only by a dimension-aware noise schedule and joint \texttt{[CLS]}-patch modeling. On ImageNet $256{\times}256$, RiT attains FID 1.45 without guidance and 1.14 with classifier-free guidance, outperforming DiT$^\text{DH}$-XL with $19\%$ fewer parameters (676M vs.\ 839M). The resulting ODE is efficiently solvable at coarse discretizations: with classifier-free guidance, $5$ Heun steps already reach FID 2.0 and $10$ steps reach 1.25, without distillation or consistency training. Code at https://github.com/lezhang7/RiT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Representation Image Transformer (RiT)，一种在冻结的DINOv2特征表示上训练的普通扩散Transformer，通过x-prediction方法进行训练，结合维度感知噪声调度和联合[CLS]-patch建模。实验表明，DINOv2特征空间相比像素空间和SD-VAE具有更优的统计特性（更高有效_rank(conditioning)、更低过剩峰度、更低插值误差），使flow-matching回归成为良好条件问题。在ImageNet 256×256上，RiT无需 Guidance 达到FID 1.45，使用 classifier-free guidance 达到FID 1.14。
AI.motivation: Flow matching通过x-prediction（回归干净数据点而非环境速度）可以有效利用低维流形结构，但像素空间中需要专门的预测头或Riemannian transport。作者想知道预训练的表示空间是否提供更有利于flow-matching学习的分布。
AI.method: 作者沿四个几何轴比较像素、SD-VAE和DINOv2特征的统计性质，提出RiT：一种在冻结DINOv2特征上通过x-prediction训练的vanilla Diffusion Transformer，仅增加维度感知噪声调度和联合[CLS]-patch建模增强。
AI.result: DINOv2与像素具有相近内在维度(~33)，但DINOv2展示7.3倍更高有效rank、35倍更好协方差conditioning、11.5倍更低过剩峰度、1.7倍更低流形插值误差。SD-VAE latent介于两者之间，表明优势源自表示学习目标而非仅压缩。RiT在ImageNet 256×256上，无guidance达到FID 1.45，有guidance达到FID 1.14，优于DiT-DH-XL（参数少19%）。5步Heun即可达FID 2.0，10步达1.25。
AI.conclusion: 预训练表示空间（尤其是DINOv2）的统计特性使flow-matching回归变成良好条件问题，无需专门预测头或Riemannian transport。RiT成功利用这些特性，在高分辨率ImageN生成任务上取得最先进结果，同时保持高效可求解性。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于使用Diffusion Transformer进行2D图像生成（image generation），而研究档案关注的是计算机图形学中的3D运动生成、人体动作捕捉和视频动作生成。虽然两者都使用Diffusion Models，但应用领域完全不同：论文关注静态2D图像合成，而研究档案需要的是从2D视频中恢复三维运动信息、生成自然的人体动作。此外，研究档案中提到的VLM、Video Generation Priors、Pose Estimation等方法在该论文中均未涉及。

title: IdleSpec: Exploiting Idle Time via Speculative Planning for LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents solve complex tasks by leveraging multi-step reasoning with iterative tool calls and environment interactions, which incur idle time while waiting for observations. Despite the prevalence of idle time in most agentic scenarios, existing works treat it as an unavoidable overhead or propose restricted solutions that overlook varying computational budgets across different tool calls and future observation uncertainty, thereby leading to suboptimal utilization of idle time. In this paper, we introduce IdleSpec, a scalable and generic inference approach that leverages idle-time computation to improve agent performance while minimizing latency overhead. Specifically, IdleSpec iteratively generates plan candidates during idle periods and, once observations become available, aggregates them to guide the next reasoning step. For effective plan generation under observation uncertainty, IdleSpec samples between complementary drafting strategies (i.e., progressive and recovery) from a learned distribution that is updated via posterior feedback. Our experiments demonstrate that IdleSpec significantly improves agent performance in various agentic scenarios by effectively utilizing idle time. In particular, on the GAIA and FRAMES, IdleSpec achieves 55.6% average accuracy with Gemini-2.5-Flash, surpassing the vanilla baseline without idle-time usage by 5.1%. Furthermore, for MLE-Bench, which involves substantial delay from code executions, IdleSpec achieves performance gains of up to 9.1% on the Any Medal rate, highlighting its generalizability to long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了IdleSpec方法，利用LLM智能体在等待观察结果时的空闲时间来生成计划候选，并通过聚合观察结果指导后续推理步骤，从而在不增加延迟的情况下提升智能体性能。在GAIA、FRAMES和MLE-Bench等基准上取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型(LLM)智能体在解决复杂任务时需要多步推理和迭代工具调用，这会产生等待观察结果的空闲时间。现有的研究将空闲时间视为不可避免的开销，或提出受限的解决方案，忽略了不同工具调用之间的计算预算差异和未来观察的不确定性，导致空闲时间利用不充分。
AI.method: 提出了IdleSpec方法，一种可扩展且通用的推理方法，利用空闲时间计算来提升智能体性能，同时最小化延迟开销。具体包括：1)在空闲期间迭代生成计划候选；2)一旦观察到可用结果，将它们聚合以指导下一步推理；3)针对观察不确定性，开发了从学习分布中采样互补草拟策略（渐进式和恢复式）的方法，通过后验反馈更新分布。
AI.result: 在GAIA和FRAMES基准上，IdleSpec使用Gemini-2.5-Flash实现了55.6%的平均准确率，比不使用空闲时间的基线提高了5.1%。在MLE-Bench上，IdleSpec在Any Medal率上实现了高达9.1%的性能提升，突显了其对长期任务的可泛化性。
AI.conclusion: IdleSpec通过有效利用空闲时间显著提升了各种智能体场景中的智能体性能，特别是在涉及代码执行延迟的长时间跨度任务中表现突出。该方法为优化LLM智能体的推理效率提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于LLM智能体的推理计划和空闲时间优化，完全属于NLP/AI Agent领域，与计算机图形学无关。该论文研究的领域是LLM Agent架构和推理优化，所使用的benchmark（GAIA、FRAMES、MLE-Bench）也都是AI Agent评估基准。虽然研究 profile 中提到了VLM，但该论文并未涉及计算机图形学中的任何应用场景（如三维运动生成、视频生成先验、姿态估计、人体动作捕捉等）。两者的应用领域完全不相符，没有任何交叉点。

title: Learning Spatiotemporal Sensitivity in Video LLMs via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning
summary: Video large language models (Video LLMs) achieve strong benchmark accuracy, yet often answer video questions through shortcuts such as single-frame cues and language priors rather than by tracking spatiotemporal dynamics. This issue is exacerbated in RL post-training, where correctness-only rewards can further reinforce shortcut policies that obtain high reward without tracking video dynamics. We address this by asking a controlled counterfactual question: if the visual world changed while the question remained fixed, should the answer change or stay the same? Based on this view, we propose \textbf{Counterfactual Relational Policy Optimization (CRPO)}, a dual-branch RL framework for improving \emph{spatiotemporal sensitivity}. CRPO constructs counterfactual videos through horizontal flips and temporal reversals, trains on both original and counterfactual branches, and introduces a \textbf{Counterfactual Relation Reward (CRR)} between their answers. CRR encourages answers to change for dynamic questions and remain unchanged for static questions. This cross-branch constraint makes it difficult for shortcut policies to be consistently rewarded across both branches. To evaluate this property, we introduce \textbf{DyBench}, a paired counterfactual video benchmark with 3,014 videos covering reversible dynamics, moving direction, and event sequence, together with a strict pair-accuracy metric that prevents fixed-answer shortcuts from inflating scores.
